examples.semai: Pelek labuk sedap bile bimasak subai bejeer campor kak masit.
examples.en: Pumpkin is delicious when cooked in coconut stew mixed with salted fish.
examples.ms: Buah labu sedap bila dimasak gulai santan dicampur ikan masin.

senses.definition_en: fontanelle; a space between the bones of the infant skull

examples.semai: Sanyet de pai biperyos, ilabut tik selun.
examples.en: A newborn baby's fontanelle is still soft.
examples.ms: Bayi yang baru dilahirkan, ubun kepalanya masih lembut.

examples.semai: Lada ajeh pejet icaknak.
examples.en: Chili is spicy when eaten.
examples.ms: Cili adalah pedas jika dimakan.

examples.semai: "Hek adeh tok joi engrok, laen de ngor laen de habeh," kiurok ya apak nu eng.
examples.en: "You are not following what was said; you did something different from what you were instructed," father said to me.
examples.ms: "Kamu ni tidak ikut cakap, lain yang disuruh lain yang kamu buat," kata bapa kepada saya.

examples.semai: Wak Siti kigemar gerteg lagu.
examples.en: Wak Siti likes to listen to songs.
examples.ms: Wak Siti suka mendengar lagu.

senses.definition_en: used to call or invite people to come
senses.definition_ms: kata yang digunakan untuk memanggil atau mengajak orang

examples.semai: "Lah madeh!" Wak Dida kicereg imenang.
examples.en: "Come here!" Wak Dida called her sister.
examples.ms: "Mari sini!" Wak Dida memanggil adiknya.

examples.semai: "Ceruk de ya siap bitaj ajeh, lai ku pelanto," ajok kior nu tenek eng.
examples.en: The finished woven mat is laid out on the veranda," my grandmother told my sister.
examples.ms: "Tikar yang dah siap dianyam itu, dibentangkan di beranda," nenek menyuruh kepada kakak saya.

senses.definition_en: clean; washed off; to come off

examples.semai: "Suj pingat lihek ajeh lei laj," amek kiurok nu menang eng.
examples.en: "Wash your dish until it is clean," my mother said to my sister.
examples.ms: "Cuci pinggan kamu itu sehingga bersih," ibu berkata kepada adik saya.

examples.semai: Hamapen Wak Nani ya kisuj iteg memerip kali, tapi dakwat pen de saru ku iteg ajeh pek laj.
examples.en: Although Wak Nani has washed her hands several times, the ink that spilled on her hand has not come off.
examples.ms: Walaupun Wak Nani sudah mencuci tangannya berberapa kali, tetapi dakwat pen yang tertumpah pada tangannya tersebut tidak tertanggal.

examples.semai: Bah Kamil kicukor ikui lei laj.
examples.en: Bah Kamil shaved his head until his head was smooth.
examples.ms: Bah Kamil mencukur kepalanya sehingga kepalanya itu licin.

examples.semai: "Abat batek de hibeliiq ku Pulau Langkawi etemjeh niknej, ikale laj bile hisuj," amok eng kipasal nu amek eng.
examples.en: "The batik sarong that we bought on Langkawi Island was not good. The colour faded when it was washed," my aunt said to my mother.
examples.ms: "Kain batik yang kita beli di Pulau Langkawi dahulu tidak elok, warnanya luntur bila dicuci," makcik saya berkata kepada ibu saya.

senses.definition_en: to act or behave like a child

examples.semai: "Agok lakkeklek, toktik bitog pen ya kijap," kiurok ya itenek nu imenang.
examples.en: "Don't be childish, you have not been hit yet but you are already crying," said the older brother to his younger sibling.
examples.ms: "Jangan mengadalah, belum dipukul lagi pun sudah menangis," kata abang pada adiknya.

senses.definition_ms: laris; laku sekali; suka dibeli orang;

examples.semai: Koi de bijual ya Wak Halimah ajeh laku, medei murah ru sedap icaknak.
examples.en: The biscuits sold by Wak Halimah are in high demand because they are cheap and tasty.
examples.ms: Kuih yang dijual oleh Wak Halimah tersebut laris, kerana ianya murah dan sedap.

senses.definition_en: to spit out; to eject something from inside the mouth
senses.definition_ms: luah; mengeluarkan sesuatu yang terdapat di dalam mulut

examples.semai: Sanget ajeh deras kilal canak ku kateh iempag bile kineng itenek kibeli aes krem.
examples.en: The child immediatly spat out all the rice from his mouth when he saw his brother buying ice cream.
examples.ms: Kanak-kanak itu segera meluahkan nasi dari mulutnya apabila ternampak abangnya membeli ais krim.

examples.semai: Amek tengah kiroh lalag ku englag deg.
examples.en: Mother is mowing the grass behind the house.
examples.ms: Emak sedang menebas lalang di belakang rumah.

examples.semai: "Hek abor en mutu, agok lalei," amek kibesat ha tenek keral eng.
examples.en: "Be careful when riding a motorcycle, do not be careless," my mother advised my brother.
examples.ms: "Hati-hati semasa membonceng motosikal, jangan cuai," ibu menasihati abang saya.

examples.semai: Cincet emas ajeh lalek, tapi iregak ihad mahal.
examples.en: The gold ring is small, but its price is very expensive.
examples.ms: Cincin emas itu adalah kecil, tetapi harganya sangat mahal.

examples.semai: Kerite Kancil de bibeh ya Perodua ajeh lalek, kena ha mai bujang.
examples.en: The Kancil car made by Perodua is small, so it is suitable for single people.
examples.ms: Kereta Kancil yang dibuat oleh Perodua itu kecil, sesuai bagi orang bujang.

examples.semai: "Cak ya hek canak kenon adeh, pek lalu kiperdij," Wak Ani kiurok nu igensir.
examples.en: "Finish this kid's food, he is not able to finish it," Wak Ani said to her husband.
examples.ms: "Kamu habiskan makanan anak ini, dia tidak mampu habiskannya," Wak Ani berkata kepada suaminya.

senses.definition_en: to pass by; to move past; to go through

examples.semai: "Amen hiha-cip nu Ipoh ju Tapah, hik hod hilalu Kampar ru Gupeg canuk," Ah Chong Lee kipasal nu Bah Selan.
examples.en: "If we want to go to Ipoh from Tapah, we have to go through Kampar and Gopeng first," Ah Chong Lee told Bah Selan.
examples.ms: "Kalau kita mahu ke Ipoh dari Tapah, kita harus melalui Kampar dan Gopeng terlebih dahulu," Ah Chong Lee memberitahu kepada Bah Selan.

senses.definition_ms: mengapa; kenapa; untuk menanyakan sebab untuk seseuatu perkara atau hal

examples.semai: "Lama tok hacip kerjak?" Wak Salmah kitanya nu igensir.
examples.en: "Why don't you go to work?" Wak Salmah asked her husband.
examples.ms: "Kenapa kamu tidak pergi kerja?" Wak Salmah bertanya kepada suaminya.

examples.semai: Bah Jali lamat kihol nu kerjak medei manik lei tengah arik.
examples.en: Bah Jali was late for work because it rained until noon.
examples.ms: Bah Jali lambat hadir ke tempat kerja kerana hujan sehingga tengah hari.

examples.semai: Kak lampap mong jeoi ijeag.
examples.en: The tinfoil barb fish has a lot of bones.
examples.ms: Ikan lampam terdapat banyak tulang.

examples.semai: "Lampau betol kelaku hek adeh!" Bah Tam kiurok ha ikenon.
examples.en: "Your behavior is so extreme!" Bah Tam said to his son.
examples.ms: "Melampau sungguh kelakuan kamu ini!" Bah Tam berkata kepada anaknya.

examples.semai: Lampu deg jik ya rusak, sebab ajehleh guer.
examples.en: The lights in our house are broken; because of that, our house is dark.
examples.ms: Lampu di rumah kami sudah rosak, sebab itulah rumah kami gelap.

senses.definition_en: a ritual song; a song used in a Sewang ceremony

examples.semai: Bile runggen sewang birunggen, hotleh mong de tukang lamur.
examples.en: During the sewang traditional dance, there must be someone singing the corresponding sewang song.
examples.ms: Semasa tarian sewang ditarikan, harus ada seseorang yang menyanyikan lagu sewang tersebut.

senses.definition_en: taboo; restriction made on the advice of a shaman resulting from the spells given by him
senses.definition_ms: pantang; larangan membuat sesuatu atas nasihat pawang akibat dari jampi yang diberikan olehnya

examples.semai: Mai de pai kiperikyos hotleh kiamal lanak de biog ya dokte.
examples.en: The one who has just given birth should follow the taboos given by the doctor.
examples.ms: Orang yang baru bersalin haruslah mengamalkan pantang yang diberi oleh doktor.

examples.semai: Wak Ira bicereg, langsong kiberlag.
examples.en: Wak Ira was called, and she immediately answered the call.
examples.ms: Wak Ira dipanggil, dia langsung menyahut panggilan tersebut.

examples.semai: Eng doh bilantek nu jawatan tetap.
examples.en: I will be appointed to a permanent position.
examples.ms: Saya akan dilantik ke jawatan tetap.

senses.definition_ms: lauk; makanan (daging atau sayuran) yang dimakan bersama nasi

examples.semai: Laok ma hacak jenek?
examples.en: What kind of side-dish did you eat with your rice earlier?
examples.ms: Lauk apa yang kamu makan tadi?

examples.semai: Mase cuti sekulah, eng ru kekenon eng jiet nu Teluk Batik, jimuh teu laot.
examples.en: During school holidays I and my children went to Teluk Batik; we bathed in the sea.
examples.ms: Semase cuti sekolah, saya dan anak-anak saya pergi ke Teluk Batik, kami mandi air laut.

examples.semai: "Lapleh renis hek ru teu dea renis hek rasa segar," Bah Man kipasal nu eng.
examples.en: "Wash your face with water so that your face feels fresh," Bah Man told me.
examples.ms: "Cucilah muka kamu dengan air supaya muka terasa segar," Bah Man memberitahu kepada saya.

examples.semai: Eng mong lapan urag tenek-menang.
examples.en: I have eight siblings.
examples.ms: Saya mempunyai lapan orang adik-beradik.

senses.definition_en: to line; to place something on a surface to protect it
senses.definition_ms: melapik; meletakkan sesuatu pada permukaan bagi melindunginya

examples.semai: "Lapek kerop cerek ajeh, beket!" amek kipasal ha tenek kerdor eng.
examples.en: "Put something under the kettle, it's hot!" mum told my sister.
examples.ms: "Lapik bawah cerek itu, ianya panas!" ibu memberitahu kepada kakak saya.

examples.semai: "Jog menang eng lar ku rantei meskar, bei tulog!" Wak Sara kisemanj tulog nu jik.
examples.en: "My sister's foot is stuck in the bicycle chain, help!" said Wak Sara asking us for help.
examples.ms: "Kaki adik saya tersekat di rantai basikal, tolong!" Wak Sara meminta tolong kepada kami.

senses.definition_en: tampoi; a type of tropical  fruit tree and its fruit which is large with light-brown skin and white flesh inside
senses.definition_ms: pokok tampoi dan buahnya; sejenis buah dengan kulit yang berwarna coklat dan isinya yang berwarna butih

examples.semai: Pelek larah adeh mong bile ku musem pelek sempak kihol.
examples.en: Tampoi fruit is also available when the durian season arrives.
examples.ms: Buah tampoi turut ada apabila musim buah durian tiba.

examples.semai: "Bok ilei de las kihol, ilei ajeh kitutop pintu," apak kipasal nu jik.
examples.en: "Whoever comes out last is the one who is going to close the door," father told us.
examples.ms: "Siapa yang terakhir keluar, dialah yang tutup pintu," bapa berkata kepada kami.

examples.semai: Las binatag macot ru jeoi ijenis.
examples.en: Ants are small insects and there are many types.
examples.ms: Semut adalah serangga yang kecil dan ada banyak jenisnya.

examples.semai: "Sanget hunen gumaken lase, engrok mai engrak naijawab," kiurok ya atok mase kibelwal ru bah eng.
examples.en: "Children nowadays are getting more and more rude, they go against the advice of their elders," said grandfather when he spoke with my uncle.
examples.ms: "Budak-budak sekarang ni semakin biadap, nasihat orang tua mereka lawan," kata datuk semasa bercakap dengan pakcik saya.

examples.semai: Jenang raaq hik entem nailog lat.
examples.en: Our ancestors used to wear loincloths.
examples.ms: Nenek moyang kita dahulu memakai cawat.

examples.semai: Lat adeh bende penteng ku mai kerdor amen naibebihip.
examples.en: The sanitary pad is important for women when they are menstruating.
examples.ms: Tuala wanita ini sangat penting bagi perempuan apabila mereka keluar haid.

senses.definition_en: cascade; a small waterfall which falls from several stages of steep rocks

examples.semai: Ku batag arik mesti mong lata teu.
examples.en: In a river there must be cascades of water.
examples.ms: Di sungai mesti ada lata air.

senses.definition_en: to utter words or behave unintentionally (often imitating another person) due to sudden shock
senses.definition_ms: melatah; mengucapkan perkataan atau berkelakuan tidak sengaja kerana kejutan secara tiba-tiba

examples.semai: Wak Zainah ajeh kuat kilatah, bikacau gek kibual ratah.
examples.en: Wak Zianah was prone to behave unintentionally. When she was teased, she would talk nonsense.
examples.ms: Wak Zianah itu kuat melatah, apabila dia diusik dia akan berkata yang bukan-bukan.

examples.semai: "Eng ya hod ngbeli spek mat, mat eng ya pek law amen ngha-bebaca," apak kiurok nu eng.
examples.en: "I have to buy glasses, my eyesight is not clear when reading," my father told me.
examples.ms: "Saya sudah harus membeli cermin mata, mata saya sudah tidak jelas jika membaca," bapa berkata kepada saya.

examples.semai: Nong nu kampug hunen ya lau amen megot medei pai bipasag lampu timbok.
examples.en: The road to the village is now bright at night because the street lights have just been installed.
examples.ms: Jalan ke kampung sekarang sudah terang pada waktu malam kerana baru dipasang lampu jalan.

examples.semai: Sanget ajeh lawa irenes.
examples.en: The child has a beautiful face.
examples.ms: Kanak-kanak tersebut mukanya cantik.

examples.semai: Kenon Wak Ramlah ru kenon Wak Maznah ubai belawan ha uman de nek nanek.
examples.en: Wak Ramlah's son and Wak Maznah's son are fighting to grab one toy.
examples.ms: Anak Wak Ramlah dan anak Wak Maznah berlawan merebut mainan yang cuma satu.

examples.semai: Eng lawe kek ajeh canak.
examples.en: I invited him to eat.
examples.ms: Saya mempelawa dia untuk makan.

senses.definition_en: to shout; to speak in a loud voice

examples.semai: Ya honj kibelawong ju pagar deg, tapi tok juga bibuka pintu.
examples.en: He was already tired of shouting from the house fence, but even the door didn't open.
examples.ms: Sudah puas dia melaung dari pagar rumah, tapi tidak juga dibuka pintu.

senses.definition_ms: layak; bersesuaian dengan sesuatu (perkerjaan, pasangan dll.)

examples.semai: Bah Kana pek layak kimuj nu tingkatan 6 medei ikeputusan SPM pek merip bor.
examples.en: Bah Kana was not qualified to enter form 6 because his SPM results were not good enough.
examples.ms: Bah Kana tidak layak memasuki ke tingkatan 6 kerana keputusan SPMnya tidak seberapa elok.

examples.semai: Jis mong pinoi de bor himain layang-layang.
examples.en: Windy conditions are suitable for playing with kites.
examples.ms: Semasa keadaan yang berangin sesuai bagi kita bermain layang-layang.

senses.definition_en: to parch; to sear; to make something hot and dry over a fire

examples.semai: Amek eng kilayur selak telei ku os dea senang kilipat kaha-bungkos kak sebelom kijop.
examples.en: My mother seared the banana leaves over the fire so that it would be easy for her to wrap the fish in them before grilling.
examples.ms: Ibu saya melayurkan daun pisang diatas api supaya senang dia melipat bagi membungkus ikan sebelum dibakar.

examples.semai: "Jok hikek tempat de leap, ku padeh beket," Wak Maria kiurok nu ikekawat.
examples.en: "Let's find a shady place, it is hot here," Wak Maria told her friends.
examples.ms: "Mari kita mencari tempat yang teduh, di sini panas," Wak Maria berkata kepada kawan-kawannya.

senses.definition_en: dense, thick; heavy (of rain); a lot of (fruit, etc.)

examples.semai: "Ku tahut adeh sempak jik kibepelek lebat," Bah Mami kipasal nu Bah Saga.
examples.en: "This year our durian trees have borne a lot of fruit," Bah Mami told Bah Saga.
examples.ms: "Pada tahun ini durian kami berbuah dengan lebat," Bah Mami memberitahu kepada Bah Saga.

examples.semai: Wak Ani kicerlah lebeh caknak tengah hari ku kateh tupperware, telas ajeh kidek ku kateh peti ais.
examples.en: Wak Ani put the lunch leftovers into the tupperware container, then put the container into the fridge.
examples.ms: Wak Ani meletakkan lebihan makanan tengah hari ke dalam tupperware, kemudian menyimpannya di dalam peti ais.

examples.semai: "Leboh tah belok kiet, jihnek ilei mong ku padeh," iamek kiberlag bile bitanya Bah Jali mongka tok ku padeg.
examples.en: "He's gone, and I don't know where he went, even though he was here earlier," his mother replied when asked if Bah Jali was at home.
examples.ms: "Hilang tidak tahu ke mana dia pergi, padahal tadi dia ada di sini," ibunya menjawab bila ditanya jika Bah Jali ada di rumah.

senses.definition_ms: becak; keadaan tanah yang berlumpur terutamanya selepas hujan

examples.semai: Bile jis manik, ku englag deg ajeh lecah medei itik kitakong teu.
examples.en: When it rains, it gets muddy next to the house because the soil holds the water.
examples.ms: Bila hari hujan, di sebelah rumah itu becak kerana tanahnya menakung air.

senses.definition_en: to tickle; to touch or poke lightly so that it causes laughter
senses.definition_ms: menggeletek; menyentuh atau mencucuk ringan sehingga menyebabkan ketawa

examples.semai: Bah Sani kileg ked ikenon, kiberentot ru ikenon ajeh.
examples.en: Bah Sani tickled his son's stomach, playing with his son.
examples.ms: Bah Sani menggeletek perut anaknya, bergurau dengan anaknya itu.

examples.semai: Bah Nan ru Bah Utas ubai leg keneng jehuk, baiha-beh ris deg.
examples.en: Bah Nan and Bah Utas are peeling the bark off the tree to make a floor for the house.
examples.ms: Bah Nan dan Bah Utas menarah pokok kayu, bagi dijadikan lantai rumah.

senses.definition_ms: tabung sumpitan; tempat menyimpan bilah damak

examples.semai: Atak tengah kiuker ileg, kibeh ragik selak.
examples.en: Grandfather is carving his blowdart quiver with a leaf pattern.
examples.ms: Datuk sedang mengukir tabung sumpitannya dengan corak daun.

examples.semai: "Serwal adeh ya lega," Bah Jali kipasal nu ikenah.
examples.en: "These trousers are already loose," Bah Jali told his wife.
examples.ms: "Seluar ini sudah longgar," Bah Jali memberitahu isterinya.

examples.semai: Pelek Legos kek bicet ya kemoj amek ku beng deg ajeh ceet tu tebal iisi.
examples.en: The fruits from the rambutan trees planted alongside the house by my late mother are sweet and their flesh is thick.
examples.ms: Buah rambutan yang ditanam oleh mendiang ibu di tepi rumah tersebut, manis dan tebal isinya.

senses.definition_en: to pluck; to harvest a flower, fruit, or leaf from its stem or stalk
senses.definition_ms: petik; mengambil bunga, buah atau pucuk daun dari tangkainya

examples.semai: Amek eng kileh lada, kiha-jual nu pasar.
examples.en: My mother picked the chillis because she wanted to sell them at the market.
examples.ms: Ibu saya memetik lada kerana mahu menjualnya di pasar.

senses.definition_ms: nafas; udara yang disedut ke dalam dan dihembuskan keluar dari paru-paru

examples.semai: Hik hotleh hibesyukor medei Jenang kiog hik lehem dea hisui ku dunia adeh.
examples.en: We should be thankful that God gave us breath so that we could live in this world.
examples.ms: Kita haruslah bersyukur kerana Tuhan memberi kita nafas supaya kita dapat hidup di dunia ini.

senses.definition_ms: berlendir; keadaan cair yang pekat lagi licin

examples.semai: Pengleg tabeg ajeh leher.
examples.en: The frog's eggs are slimy.
examples.ms: Telur katak tersebut berlendir.

examples.semai: Kerite Wak Jangkur lehot kilaggar kerite mai.
examples.en: Wak Jangkur's car was dented after she hit someone else's car.
examples.ms: Kereta Wak Jangkur terkemik setelah dia melanggar kerita orang.

senses.definition_en: term to address one's son-in-law or daughter-in-law

examples.semai: "Lei! Nyong kenon engkek adeh," amek eng kicereg imengsau.
examples.en: "Son-in-law! Take this child of yours," my mother called her son-in-law.
examples.ms: "Menantu! Ambil anak kamu ini," ibu saya memanggil menantunya.

examples.semai: Bah Jali kicakcak lei kibakhek.
examples.en: Bah Jali ate until he was full.
examples.ms: Bah Jali makan sehingga kenyang.

examples.semai: Mase jik jibemutu nu kedei idui nek, mong nuikor cok kilejang nu ngar mutu jik.
examples.en: When we went to the store on a motorcycle yesterday, there was a dog which went ahead in front of our motorcycle.
examples.ms: Semasa kami ke kedai dengan membonceng motosikal semalam, terdapat seekor anjing yang mara ke hadapan motosikal kami.

examples.semai: Lek ya gujeoi ku ladang sawet medei naicak ha pelek sawet.
examples.en: There are many pigs found in oil palm plantations, because they eat oil palm fruit.
examples.ms: Terdapat banyak babi di ladang sawit kerana memakan buah sawit.

senses.definition_en: asian forest tortoise; asian brown tortoise

examples.semai: Lek koh adeh ya kurang, medei jeoi biberkep ha isej.
examples.en: The number of asian brown tortoises has decreased as they are often caught for their meat.
examples.ms: Bilangan kura-kura hutan sudah berkurangan kerana sering ditangkap untuk dagingnya.

examples.semai: Tingkap deg ajok ya lekang medei ya manah.
examples.en: The window in my grandmother's house is loose because it is old.
examples.ms: Tingkap rumah nenek sudah lekang kerana sudah lama.

examples.semai: Ali lekat kigei ru iamek-apak, hamapen ya kibekenah-kenon.
examples.en: Ali still lives with his parents, even though he is married and has children.
examples.ms: Ali masih tinggal bersama dengan ibu bapanya, walaupun dia sudah beristeri dan mempunyai anak-anak.

senses.definition_en: to laugh irresistibly; to burst out laughing
senses.definition_ms: gelak ketawa yang tidak dapat ditahan-tahan; ketawa yang kuat akibat mendengar sesuatu perkara yang melucukan atau menggelikan hati

examples.semai: Bah Joel kilog lekkeg kineng Maharaja Lawak.
examples.en: Bah Joel laughed out loud watching the reality show 'Maharaja Lawak'.
examples.ms: Bah Joel ketawa terbahak-bahak menonton Maharaja Lawak.

examples.semai: Berog Bah Jalal lekket ya sengep medei pai dij kimain bula.
examples.en: Bah Jamal's body was sticky with sweat because he had just finished playing football.
examples.ms: Badan Bah Jamal melekit oleh peluh kerana dia baharu habis bermain bola sepak.

senses.definition_en: to ambush, to lie in wait; to lurk; to spy
senses.definition_ms: mengintai; menghendap sesuatu sebagai binatang atau orang

examples.semai: Singha ajeh kileklep, kaha-jerkop ha becog.
examples.en: The lion was lying in wait ready to pounce on the mousedeer.
examples.ms: Singa itu sedang menghendap untuk menerkam kancil.

examples.semai: Tenek eng pek kisedar apak jik tengah kileklep kineng ha ilei de kinyuk rukok ku belakang deg.
examples.en: My brother did not realize that our father was spying on him as he was smoking in the backyard.
examples.ms: Abang saya tidak menyedari bapa kami sedang mengintai dirinya yang sedang merokok di belakang rumah.

examples.semai: Apak eng ru ikekawat naiet naileklep ku darat ru naijog naien nar ikor kus.
examples.en: My father went hunting in the woods with his friends and came home with two porcupines.
examples.ms: Bapa saya pergi memburu ke hutan dengan rakan-rakannya dan pulang membawa dua ekor landak.

senses.definition_en: to get back together (with respect to marriage) after being separate for a while
senses.definition_ms: kembali bersama semula setelah berpisah (berkenaan dengan perkahwinan)

examples.semai: Tenek eng ru ikenah ya baileklos nij.
examples.en: My brother and his wife have got back together again.
examples.ms: Abang saya dan isterinya telah kembali bersama semula.

examples.semai: "Mat eng leknyup nggerteg lagu kek ajeh," Wak Ani kiurok nu ikekawat, kikomen ha Wak Sali kibelagu.
examples.en: "I feel sleepy hearing her sing," Wak Ani said to her friends, commenting on Wak Sali's singing.
examples.ms: "Mata saya mengantuk mendengar dia menyanyi," Wak Ani berkata kepada kawan-kawannya, dia berkomen tentang Wak Sali yang bernyanyi.

examples.semai: "Tulog isi minyak ku pelite ajeh, ios ya guleknyup medei ya kaha-dij iminyak," apak kiurok nu tenek eng.
examples.en: "Please fill the lamp with oil, the flame is getting dimmer because the oil is running out," father said to my brother.
examples.ms: "Tolong isikan minyak pada pelita tersebut, apinya sudah semakin malap kerana minyaknya sudah semakin habis," bapa berkata kepada abang saya.

senses.definition_en: a person who has Indian heritage

examples.semai: Eng mong kawat ju bangsa lel.
examples.en: I have an Indian friend.
examples.ms: Saya mempunyai kawan dari bangsa India.

examples.semai: "Eng ngpoj hek jog kerjak lingah, lelame ngbukbet canuk," Wak Hana kiurok nu igensir.
examples.en: "I waited for you to come home from work but you were late, eventually I fell asleep," Wak Hana said to her husband.
examples.ms: "Saya tunggu kamu pulang kerja tetapi kamu lewat, lama-kelamaan saya tertidur," Wak Hana berkata kepada suaminya.

senses.definition_en: to protrude; to stick out one's tongue

examples.semai: Amek kineng tijik leliwai ku kerop deg.
examples.en: Mother saw a snake sticking out its tongue under the house.
examples.ms: Ibu ternampak ular menjulur di bawah rumah.

examples.semai: "Amen jeoi lemak ku berog, hik buleh hikep jeoi penyaket de kilek," dokte kinasihat ha apak eng mase kibeh pemeriksaan kesihatan.
examples.en: "If there is a lot of fat in the body, we can get a lot of other diseases," the doctor advised my father while he was doing a health check.
examples.ms: "Jika terdapat banyak lemak pada badan, kita boleh mendapat banyak penyakit yang lain," doktor menasihati bapa saya semasa dia melakukan pemeriksaan kesihatan.

senses.definition_en: glutinous rice mixed with coconut milk and cooked in bamboo
senses.definition_ms: lemang; pulut yang telah dicampur dengan air santan dan dimasak di dalam buluh

examples.semai: Ku jap raya mesti mong lemang.
examples.en: Every time there is a festival, there must be lemang (a special glutinous rice dish served with coconut milk).
examples.ms: Setiap kali waktu perayaan, mesti terdapat lemang.

examples.semai: "Abat de pai ngtil jihnek lekat lembap," tenek eng kipasal nu amek.
examples.en: "The clothes that I just put out under the sun are still damp," my sister said to my mother.
examples.ms: "Pakaian yang baru saya jemur tadi masih lembap," kakak saya berkata kepada ibu.

examples.semai: "Sej adeh ya kilembot medei bibercet liu ku kemil os," amek kipasal nu ajok jik.
examples.en: "This meat is already tender because it has been cooked for a long time on the fire," my mother told our grandmother.
examples.ms: "Daging ini sudah lembut kerana dimasak dengan lama di atas api," ibu memberitahu kepada nenek kami.

examples.semai: Ku kampug eng jeoi lembu biterlas ratah, selalo naigei ku kemil timbok.
examples.en: In my village there are many cows being released and roaming freely, often they will sit on the road.
examples.ms: Di kampung saya terdapat banyak lembu yang dilepaskan dan berkeliaran secara bebas, selalunya mereka akan duduk di atas jalan raya.

senses.definition_en: thigh; the part of the leg between the knee and the waist
senses.definition_ms: paha; bahagian kaki antara lutut dan pinggul

examples.semai: Lempak menai eng luka medei kiyog ju keneng jehuk.
examples.en: My brother-in-law's thigh was bleeding because he fell from a tree.
examples.ms: Paha adik ipar saya luka kerana dia terjatuh dari pokok.

senses.definition_en: slow in thinking or working, but not stupid
senses.definition_ms: lembab; lambat cara pemikiran atau bekerja

examples.semai: Wak Nila lempep ikerenjak, mai kilek ya siap memerip batas, ku kek ilei de nek nanek ajeh pen lekat pekseg siap.
examples.en: Wak Nila is a slow worker. Even if someone else already set up some steps, for her even just one step would not be accomplished.
examples.ms: Wak Nila seorang yang bekerja dengan lembab, orang lain telah menyiapkan berberapa batas, pada dia batas yang satu tersebut pun belum disiapkan lagi.

examples.semai: Nuberkes ju os ajeh bibeg ya lempo os de dah bipal.
examples.en: One bundle of the firewood was tied with wild ginger that had been beaten.
examples.ms: Seberkas kayu api itu diikat menggunakan pokok tepus yang dah dipukul.

examples.semai: Mai Sabah naicak lempos adeh. Enai naijerok lempos ru naicereg imuh 'tuhau.'
examples.en: The Sabahans eat the tepus trees. They pickle the stem of the tree and call the dish as 'tuhau.'
examples.ms: Orang Sabah memakan pokok tepus. Mereka menjeruk batang tepus dan memanggilnya sebagai 'tuhau.'

examples.semai: "Lempuk nij heha-hol nu madeg?" Bah Kamil kitanya nu Bah Jose mase ubai besimbang ku talipon.
examples.en: "When do you want to come to my home?" Bah Kamil asked Bah Jose as they both chatted on the phone.
examples.ms: "Bila lagi kamu mahu datang ke rumah?" Bah Kamil bertanya kepada Bah Jose semasa mereka berdua bersembang di ta

examples.semai: "Mong kenon rau ku lemug jehuk ajeh" apak kipasal nu jik.
examples.en: "There is a baby monkey at the top of that tree," father told us.
examples.ms: "Terdapat anak kera pada hujung pokok itu," bapa memberitahu pada kami.

examples.semai: Mai biet nu sekulah naiha-kek lemuk.
examples.en: People go to school to seek knowledge.
examples.ms: Orang pergi ke sekolah untuk mencari ilmu.

examples.semai: Bah eng kiet nu hospital medei nyik ilemunj.
examples.en: My uncle went to the hospital because his teeth hurt.
examples.ms: Pakcik saya pergi ke hospital kerana giginya sakit.

examples.semai: Mase ku sekulah jik biajar geros lemunj dea bersih.
examples.en: When we were at school, we were taught to brush our teeth so that they would be clean.

examples.semai: Bah Sani ajeh leng ju ikekawat de kilek.
examples.en: Bah Sani is shorter than his friends.
examples.ms: Bah Sani adalah rendah dari kawan-kawan yang lain.

examples.semai: Jot ilenghig kineng menasak ku bob masak.
examples.en: He drools when he sees the dishes in the cookbook.
examples.ms: Dia meleleh air liur apabila melihat masakan di buku masak.

examples.semai: Besenger jot iteu lenghig ku ibantal.
examples.en: His saliva dribbling on the pillow was disgusting.
examples.ms: Menggelikan air liurnya meleleh di bantal.

senses.definition_en: to tilt the head upwards; to look up
senses.definition_ms: mengangkat muka; memandang atau melihat ke atas

examples.semai: Bah Man kilengij kaha-neng ha kapal terbang ku sagop.
examples.en: Bah Man looked up in order to see the aeroplane in the clouds.
examples.ms: Bah Man mendongak untuk melihat kapal terbang di awan.

examples.semai: Bah Tam pek lengkap kiisi borang permohonan ajeh padehjeh, sebab ajehleh pek kikep sambong belajar.
examples.en: The other day, Bah Tam did not fill out the application form completely. That is why he could not continue his studies.
examples.ms: Tempoh hari, Bah Tam tidak mengisi borang permohonan dengan lengkap. Itulah sebabnya dia tidak dapat melanjutkan pelajarannya.

examples.semai: Bah Luj selalo kilenglod ha iamek.
examples.en: Bah Luj always deceived his mother.
examples.ms: Bah Luj selalu menipu ibunya.

examples.semai: Ku Malaysia mong 13 lengrik.
examples.en: There are 13 states in Malaysia.
examples.ms: Di Malaysia terdapat 13 buah negeri.

senses.definition_en: gum; flesh around the roots of the teeth

examples.semai: Kenon Wak Ayu kijap medei as ilengsej.
examples.en: Wak Ayu's son cried because his gums were swollen.
examples.ms: Anak kepada Wak Ayu menangis kerana gusinya bengkak.

senses.definition_ms: terbiasa; tidak hairan; bukan perkara yang baru

examples.semai: Baju Bah Lan keaj lenjun medei bitimpak ya manik.
examples.en: Bah Lan's clothes were soaking wet because he got caught in the rain.
examples.ms: Baju Bah Lan basah kuyup kerana ditimpa hujan.

examples.semai: Wak Nani biles ya iapak medei kilenon ku icikgu.
examples.en: Wak Nani was scolded by her father for lying to her teacher.
examples.ms: Wak Nani dimarahi oleh bapanya kerana menipu gurunya.

examples.semai: "Lentag eng kicor amen ngcak bende keer," Bah Jan kipasal nu ikekawat.
examples.en: "My tongue stings if I eat sour things," Bah Jan told his friends.
examples.ms: "Lidah saya pedih jika saya makan benda yang masam," Bah Jan memberitahu rakan-rakannya.

examples.semai: Bah Amir kilenyim bile bicereg.
examples.en: Bah Amir grinned when called.
examples.ms: Bah Amir tersengih apabila dipanggil.

examples.semai: Bah Kami kilog bile kineng Bah Tam leleoi imat kaha-bukbet, pek kisedar Cikgu Maznah tengah kineng ha ilei.
examples.en: Bah Kamil laughed when he saw Bah Tam's sleepy eyes, since he was about to fall asleep without noticing that his teacher Ms. Maznah was looking at him.
examples.ms: Bah Kamil ketawa melihat mata Bah Tam mengantuk kerana hendak tertidur tanpa menyedari Cikgu Maznah sedang melihat pada beliau.

examples.semai: Bah Man ru Bah Jali ubai jar nu tempat de leop medei tiba-tiba taleh kimanik.
examples.en: Bah Man and Bah Jali ran to a sheltered place because it suddenly started raining.
examples.ms: Bah Man dan Bah Jali berlari ke tempat yang teduh kerana tiba-tiba sahaja hujan turun.

examples.semai: Wak Ani kikoh teh ajeh nu cawan ru kipoj memerip minit dea iteh ajeh leop gek, baruleh kingut.
examples.en: Wak Ani poured the tea into the cup and waited for a few minutes for the tea to cool down a bit before drinking it.
examples.ms: Wak Ani menuang teh ke dalam cawan dan menunggu berberapa minit supaya tehnya tersebut menyejuk sedikit sebelum meminumnya.

senses.definition_en: to peep, to look quickly and secretly; to peek, to watch secretly

examples.semai: Amekjop eng kilep ku tingkap, tah ma de kiperibet.
examples.en: My grandmother peeked out the window, we did not know who she was spying on.
examples.ms: Nenek saya mengintai ditingkap, tidak tahu dia intipkan.

examples.semai: Bah Sam ru imenang baiet nu Lep Kandu ku Gupeg.
examples.en: Bah Sam and his brother went to Kandu Cave in Gopeng.
examples.ms: Bah Sam dan adiknya pergi ke Gua Kandu di Gopeng.

examples.semai: Leptop Bah Yan rusak, jadi hajap kaha-beh ikerjak.
examples.en: Bah Yan's laptop is not working, so it's hard for him to do his work.
examples.ms: Komputer riba Bah Yan rosak, jadi susah bagi dia untuk membuat kerja.

examples.semai: Jog ajok eng leryar amen kigei liu ku patik.
examples.en: My grandmother's legs become numb if she sits on the floor for a long time.
examples.ms: Kaki nenek saya menjadi kebas jika duduk lama di lantai.

examples.semai: Bah Dabu leryor iberog kimuh teu kampug medei ha sengij iteu.
examples.en: Bah Dabu's body shivered because he bathed in the cold village water.
examples.ms: Badan Bah Dabu menggigil kerana mandi air kampung yang sejuk.

examples.semai: Wak Jaja kiles ha ikekenon de naimuh manik.
examples.en: Wak Jaja scolded his children who were playing in the rain.
examples.ms: Wak Jaja memarahi anak-anaknya yang mandi hujan.

senses.definition_ms: kemaluan perempuan untuk wanita atau betina

examples.semai: Let cok ajeh as medei naikekkap kelem cinek.
examples.en: The dogs' genitals swelled as they had been fighting the night before.
examples.ms: Kemaluan anjing itu membengkak kerana mereka bergaduh malam tadi.

examples.semai: Os ajeh ya let.
examples.en: The fire has been extinguished.
examples.ms: Api itu sudah padam.

examples.semai: Mat lada de bisepag ya tenek eng padeh jeh ya nailet.
examples.en: The pepper seeds sown by my sister the other day have already grown.
examples.ms: Biji lada yang ditaburkan oleh kakak saya pada tempoh hari sudah tumbuh.

examples.semai: "Let ateh, mai bejual ais krem ya kihol!" menang eng kipasal nu ikekawat.
examples.en: "Look over there, the ice cream vendor is here!" my sister told her friends.
examples.ms: "Lihat ke sana, penjual ais krim sudah datang!" adik saya memberitahu rakan-rakannya.

senses.definition_en: to touch something with bare hand; to poke; to tease
senses.definition_ms: menyentuh sesuatu dengan tangan; mengusik; sentuh; mengajuk

examples.semai: Amek pek kiperasan menang jik de sanget tengah kileu tepong de kibancoh, mase ilei kiet nu tandas sekejap.
examples.en: Our mother was not aware that our younger sister had touched the flour mixture while she went to the toilet for a moment.
examples.ms: Ibu kami tidak perasan adik kami yang masih kecil mengusik bancuhan tepung semasa dia ke tandas sebentar.

examples.semai: "Agok leu caknak ajeh, teg hek kutor!" amek kiles ha menang jik.
examples.en: "Don't touch the food, your hands are dirty!" Mom scolded our younger brother.
examples.ms: "Jangan menyentuh makanan tersebut, tangan kamu kotor!" ibu memarahi adik kami.

examples.semai: Wak Ira kibeleunj bile bior masak.
examples.en: Wak Ira grumbled when asked to cook.
examples.ms: Wak Ira bersunggut-sungut apabila disuruh memasak.

senses.definition_en: to whisper; to talk quietly so as not to be heard by other people
senses.definition_ms: berbisik-bisik; bercakap perlahan supaya tidak didengari oleh orang lain

examples.semai: Wak Samnah ru Wak Neli ajeh tah ma ubai beleunj ubai nar?
examples.en: What were Wak Samnah and Wak Neli whispering about?
examples.ms: Perkara apakah yang dibisikkan oleh Wak Samnah dan Wak Neli tersebut?

examples.semai: Binatag ku serag liar bebandeng de hibela.
examples.en: Animals in the forest are wilder than those that we raise.
examples.ms: Binatang di hutan lebih liar berbanding yang dibela.

senses.definition_ms: lebar berkenaan dengan ukuran luas sesuatu

examples.semai: "Merip ilibar deg hek adeh?" apak kitanya nu eng.
examples.en: "How wide is your house?" father asked me.
examples.ms: "Berapa kelebaran rumah kamu ini?" bapa bertanya kepada saya.

senses.definition_en: to fry without oil; to dry-fry

examples.semai: Wak Sila kilig serundeng sej de kimasak kelemnek, kiserep sebelom kijamu nu itengloh.
examples.en: Wak Sila dry-fried the meat floss she cooked the previous day, she heated it before serving it to the guests.
examples.ms: Wak Sila menyangai serunding daging yang dia masak semalam, memanaskannya sebelum menjamunya kepada tetamu.

examples.semai: Menare Teluk Intan ajeh liheg, sama judukan begei menare condong Pisa ku negare Itali.
examples.en: The Tower of Teluk Intan is tilted, it looks the same as the Leaning Tower of Pisa in Italy.
examples.ms: Menara Teluk Intan adalah condong, ianya kelihatan sama seperti menara condong Pisa yang terdapat di negara Itali.

examples.semai: "Lihek de beurok hanyek cakcak, jadi pek ngbrencet tengah arik adeh. Telas ajeh, haurok hacuag pulak!" Wak Nina kiles ha igensir.
examples.en: "You yourself said you didn't want to eat, so I didn't cook this afternoon. Then, you said you were hungry!" Wak Nina scolded her husband.
examples.ms: "Kamu sendiri yang berkata kamu tidak mahu makan, jadi saya tidak memasak tengah hari ini. Kemudian, kamu berkata kamu lapar pula!" Wak Nina memarahi suaminya.

examples.semai: Pengemis ajeh kilip ilihig kineng canak de besendap.
examples.en: The beggar salivated looking at the tantalizing food.
examples.ms: Pengemis itu menelan air liurnya melihat makanan yang menyedapkan.

examples.semai: "Lik eng de pai ngkot ya nyep, tah bok de kot," amek kiurok.
examples.en: "The frying pan that I just bought is gone, I don't know who took it," mum said.
examples.ms: "Kuali yang baru saya beli hilang, tidak tahu siapa yang mengambil," ibu berkata.

examples.semai: Bah Man kitengroj kikep nuikor kak liko.
examples.en: Bah Man went fishing and catched a common carp.
examples.ms: Bah Man memancing dan mendapat seekor ikan Lee Koh.

examples.semai: "Jik jiguna lilen medei tiktok letreg," Bah Ram kipasal nu iatok.
examples.en: "We are using candles due to the electricity cut," Bah Ram told his grandfather.
examples.ms: "Kami menggunakan lilin kerana ketiadaan eletrik," Bah Ram memberitahu datuknya.

examples.semai: Kuceg Wak Limah pai kiperyos lima ikor ikekenon.
examples.en: Wak Limah's new cat gave birth to five kittens.
examples.ms: Kucing Wak Limah baharu melahirkan lima ekor anak.

examples.semai: "Amek, Bah wak kigit ilimbarik ku eng!" Wak Nia kijap nu iamek medei bikatik ya itenek.
examples.en: "Mother, Bah Wan wiped his stale saliva on me!" Wak Nia cried for her mother because she was teased by her brother.
examples.ms: "Ibu, Bah Wan mengelap air liur basinya pada saya!" Wak Nia menangis pada ibunya kerana diusik oleh abangnya.

examples.semai: Wak Tina kibeli limpon ha nerendam abat.
examples.en: Wak Tina bought a basin in which to soak clothes.
examples.ms: Wak Tina membeli besen bagi merendam pakaian.

examples.semai: Wak Tia kibet linak telas kingut penglai kenghol.
examples.en: Wak Tia slept soundly after taking cough medicine.
examples.ms: Wak Tia tidur dengan lena setelah meminum ubat batuk.

examples.semai: Bah Uda lingah kiet nu sekulah.
examples.en: Bah Uda slowly went to school.
examples.ms: Bah Uda lewat pergi ke sekolah.

examples.semai: Wah Bila kibeli lingkong ha imenang.
examples.en: Wah Bila bought grass jelly for her sister.
examples.ms: Wah Bila membeli lengkong bagi adiknya.

senses.definition_ms: lintah; sejenis binatang penghisap darah yang tinggal di dalam air dan bersaiz sebesar jari kelingking orang dewasa

examples.semai: Ku paya mong jeoi lintah, lagi-lagi ku tempat de jeoi kerbau.
examples.en: In the swamp there are many leeches, especially in places where there are many buffaloes.
examples.ms: Di paya terdapat banyak lintah, terutama pada tempat yang terdapat banyak kerbau.

examples.semai: Menang kerdor eng kinyek pek kaha-lip penglai de kedej ajeh.
examples.en: My younger sister didn't want to swallow the bitter medicine.
examples.ms: Adik perempuan saya tidak mahu menelan ubat yang pahit itu.

examples.semai: Bah Ek kijap medei bilipar ikui ya itenek.
examples.en: Bah Ek cried because his brother hit his head.
examples.ms: Bah Ek menangis kerana kepalanya dipukul oleh abangnya.

examples.semai: Bah Man kitulog ikenah lipat baju.
examples.en: Bah Man helped his wife folding the clothes.
examples.ms: Bah Man menolong isterinya melipat baju.

senses.definition_en: young man; teenage boy; unmarried young man

examples.semai: "Kenon wak hek ya litau," eng ngurok nu Wak Raya.
examples.en: "Your aunt's son has become a teenager," I told Wak Raya.
examples.ms: "Anak makcik kamu sudah menjadi anak teruna," saya berkata kepada Wak Raya.

examples.semai: "Liu juga cerite gop adeh," apak kikomen.
examples.en: "This Malay movie is quite long," father commented.
examples.ms: "Lama juga cerita melayu ini," bapa memberi komen.

senses.definition_en: to revolve; to hover; to roam; to circle around

examples.semai: Pulis merip noh nailiwar ku kawasan deg jik.
examples.en: The police have circled around our house several times.
examples.ms: Polis sudah beberapa kali berlegar-legar di kawasan rumah kami.

examples.semai: Arnab kigemar cak lobak.
examples.en: Rabbits like to eat carrots.
examples.ms: Arnab suka memakan lobak.

senses.definition_ms: loceng; sejenis alat berongga yang diperbuat daripada logam dan berbunyi nyaring apabila digoyangkan atau dipukul dengan sesuatu objek;

examples.semai: Loceng sekulah ya kibengrok, imakstojeh time sekulah ya dij.
examples.en: The school bell has rung, which means that school time is over.
examples.ms: Loceng sekolah sudah berdering, maksudnya waktu persekolahan telah tamat.

examples.semai: Mase nget nu Sabah, eng ngbakek Lod Kinabalu ku kennyak.
examples.en: When I went to Sabah, I saw Mount Kinabalu from afar.
examples.ms: Semasa saya pergi ke Sabah, saya nampak Gunung Kinabalu dari jauh.

examples.semai: Kui kuceg ajeh log ku pagar.
examples.en: The cat's head was stuck in the fence.
examples.ms: Kepala kucing tersebut tersekat di pagar.

examples.semai: Bah Man kigemar log seluar jeans.
examples.en: Bah Man likes to wear jeans.
examples.ms: Bah Man suka memakai seluar jeans.

examples.semai: Wak Mira kigemar log mikap, pek kira kigei padeg atao kihol nu luar, kek selalo kilog mikap.
examples.en: Wak Mira likes to wear makeup, no matter whether sitting at home or out of the house, she always wears makeup.
examples.ms: Wak Mira suka memakai alat solek, tidak mengira samada duduk di rumah atau keluar dari rumah, dia selalu memakai alat solek.

examples.semai: Bah Jamal birok ya iamek medei kilog rantei cap tengkurak.
examples.en: Bah Jamal was scolded by his mother for wearing a skull necklace.
examples.ms: Bah Jamal dimarahi oleh ibunya kerana memakai rantai tengkorak.

senses.definition_en: particle giving emphasis to the root word or phrase
senses.definition_ms: partikel yang diletakkan di akhiran sesuatu perkataan bagi menekan maksud perkataan tersebut

examples.semai: Ajehloh ilei!
examples.en: That's him!
examples.ms: Itulah dia!

examples.semai: Bah Yan kigemar liloi ku kulam.
examples.en: Bah Yan likes to swim in the pool.
examples.ms: Bah Yan suka berenang di kolam renang.

examples.semai: "Bile haloi madeh?" Bah Wan kitanya nu Bah Jali.
examples.en: "When did you arrive here?" Bah Wan asked Bah Jali.
examples.ms: "Bila kamu sampai ke sini?" Bah Wan bertanya kepada Bah Jali.

examples.semai: Bah Sari ya kaha-loi nu ikampug.
examples.en: Bah Sari already wants to reach his house.
examples.ms: Bah Sari sudah mahu sampai ke kampungnya.

examples.semai: "Seh bawang adeh loi hancor," amek kipasal nu menang jik.
examples.en: "Pound this onion until it is crushed," mum said to our sister.
examples.ms: "Tumbuk bawang ini sehingga hancur," ibu berkata kepada adik kami.

examples.semai: Sog Wak Mila biloj ya iamek medei ha jeoi icek.
examples.en: Wak Mila's hair was shaved off by her mother because there were a lot of lice.
examples.ms: Rambut Wak Mila dicukur oleh ibunya kerana terdapat banyak kutu.

examples.semai: Shiva kiloj imisei.
examples.en: Shiva is shaving his moustache.
examples.ms: Shiva mencukur misainya.

senses.definition_en: to try to get loose from bonds or from someone's clasp
senses.definition_ms: meronta-ronta; berusaha melepaskan diri daripada pegangan

examples.semai: Becog ajeh kiloj ju empag singha.
examples.en: The mousedeer is trying to loose itself from the lion's mouth.
examples.ms: Kancil tersebut meronta-ronta di mulut singa.

examples.semai: Bah Atang ajeh kenon iloj.
examples.en: Bah Atang is the youngest child.
examples.ms: Bah Atang itu anak bongsu.

senses.definition_ms: zakar; kemaluan bagi lelaki atau jantan

examples.semai: Lok cok ajeh luka medei bikap mase naibelawan ratak liknai.
examples.en: The dogs' genitals were injured because they were bitten while they were fighting with each other.
examples.ms: Kemaluan anjing tersebut luka kerana digigit semasa mereka berlawan sesama sendiri.

examples.semai: Eng lok kekdeh jar et madeh.
examples.en: I came here with him.
examples.ms: Saya dengan dia datang ke sini.

examples.semai: "Eng kenon ilong ku kateh peringak eng," Bah Gani kipasal nu ikekawat.
examples.en: "I am the oldest child in my family" Bah Gani told his friends.
examples.ms: "Saya anak yang sulung dalam keluarga saya," Bah Gani memberitahu rakan-rakannya.

senses.definition_en: name usually for the oldest child in a family
senses.definition_ms: (L-) panggilan atau gelaran nama yang mengikut turutan kelahiran untuk anak sulung

examples.semai: Ileli kek ilong ajeh imuh Bah Fira.
examples.en: The name of the oldest child is Bah Fira.
examples.ms: Yang sulung itu namanya Bah Fira.

examples.semai: Bah Badal iteninoi ya long iapak.
examples.en: Bah Badal is already the same size as his father.
examples.ms: Saiz Bah Badal sudah sebesar bapanya.

senses.definition_ms: gulung; menggulung; benda yang berlembar-lembar dan dapat dilipat untuk dijadikan bentuk silinder (kertas; daun dsb)

examples.semai: Amekjop kilor ibakau sebelom mula kijinjaaj.
examples.en: My grandmother rolled her tobacco before starting to weed.
examples.ms: Nenek saya menggulung tembakaunya sebelum mulai mencabut rumput.

examples.semai: Mat langsat ajeh ya lor, pek liu nij doh ya buleh bicet.
examples.en: The langsat seed have sprouted, soon they can be planted.
examples.ms: Biji langsat tersebut sudah bertunas, tidak lama lagi ianya boleh ditanam.

senses.definition_en: to slither on the chest; to army-crawl

examples.semai: Kenon eng ya kilor.
examples.en: My baby already knows how to army-crawl.
examples.ms: Bayi saya sudah pandai menyusur.

examples.semai: "Tuntop butol adeh ya los," tenek eng kipasal nu amek.
examples.en: "The bottle cap is already loose," my sister told my mother.
examples.ms: "Penutup botol ini sudah longgar," kakak saya memberitahu ibu.

examples.semai: Jik jilos nij nu madeg, pek jadi jihol nu pekan medei gertak ku nong entoi kitateh ya manik ru beag.
examples.en: We returned home, not being able to go out to the town because the bridge on the main road had collapsed due to rain and flooding.
examples.ms: Kami kembali ke rumah, tidak jadi kami mahu keluar ke pekan kerana jambatan yang di jalan utama sudah runtuh akibat hujan dan banjir.

examples.semai: Mat jik lot jineng sanget ajeh kiyog.
examples.en: Our eyes widened when we saw the boy fall.
examples.ms: Mata kami terbeliak apabila melihat budak itu jatuh.

examples.semai: Sanget pai yos kilot imem.
examples.en: Newborns suck their milk.
examples.ms: Bayi yang baru lahir menghisap susunya.

senses.definition_ms: terang; jelas; nampak nyata (berkenaan dengan penglihatan)

examples.semai: "Tules aentoi gek, pek lou ngbaca," apak kipasal nu menang eng.
examples.en: "Write bigger, it's not clear enough for me to read it," my father said to my sister.
examples.ms: "Tulis besar sedikit, tidak jelas saya membacanya," bapa berkata kepada adik saya.

examples.semai: Bah Samil kitanya nu ikenah, cengroi mongka tok? Ikenah kibalas, "Ya luak."
examples.en: Bah Samil asked his wife, "is there any rice left or not?" His wife replied, "it's getting less."
examples.ms: Bah Samil bertanya kepada isterinya, beras masih ada atau tidak? Isterinya membalas, "Sudah berkurangan."

examples.semai: Amek Wak Nani kigemar ha bunga. Ku kateh deg enai ru ku luar deg enai penuh ya bunga taleh.
examples.en: Wak Nani's mother loves flowers. The insite and outsite of their house is just filled with flowers.
examples.ms: Ibu Wak Nani menyukai bunga. Di dalam rumah dan di luar rumah mereka dipenuhi dengan bunga sahaja.

examples.semai: "Padag kampug jik ihad luas, ngrasa muat nar padag bula," Bah Liko kipasal nu jik.
examples.en: "The field in our village is very spacious, I think it could accommodate as many as two football fields," Bah Liko told us.
examples.ms: "Padang di kampung kami sangat luas, saya rasa boleh memuatkan sebanyak dua padang bola sepak," Bah Liko memberitahu kepada kami.

examples.semai: Nong nu Jalan Pahang jeoi lubang.
examples.en: There are many potholes in the road in Jalan Pahang.
examples.ms: Terdapat banyak lubang pada jalanraya di Jalan Pahang.

senses.definition_ms: tanya berulang-ulang; menyoal suspek berulang-ulang untuk mendapat bukti

examples.semai: Mase pulis naisiasat ha mai jahat, enai mesti nailuej lei mai jahat ajeh kimengaku.
examples.en: While the police were investigating the bad guys, they must have asked them repeatedly until the bad guys confessed.
examples.ms: Semasa polis menyiasat orang jahat, mereka mesti bertanya berulang kali sehingga orang jahat tersebut mengaku.

examples.semai: Bah Adok kilug lei kaha-hol iteu mat.
examples.en: Bah Adok laughed until he cried.
examples.ms: Bah Adok ketawa sampai matanya berair.

examples.semai: Mase arik beket, tenek keral eng kirasa beket ru kiluig.
examples.en: When the weather is hot, my elder brother feels hot and dizzy.
examples.ms: Semasa cuaca yang panas abang saya merasa panas dan pening.

examples.semai: Wak Sali kilulos temuduga jihnek.
examples.en: Wak Sali passed the interview earlier.
examples.ms: Wak Sali lulus temuduga tadi.

examples.semai: "Ku kampug eng mong jeoi lumbong," Bah Nan kipasal nu jik.
examples.en: "In my village there are many abandoned tin mines," Bah Nan told us.
examples.ms: "Di kampung saya terdapat banyak lombong tinggal," Bah Nan memberitahu kami.

examples.semai: "Yayak lumom, pek kipanei ma-ma, tiba-tiba biles," Wak Sali kipasal ha Bah Meran nu jik, de biles ya Cekgu Ramlah medei mong sampah ku imije, tapi binakal ya sanget kilek de naipej sampah ku mije kek.
examples.en: "Pity him, he didn't know anything about it, he was suddenly scolded just like that," Wak Sali told us about Bah Meran who was scolded by Cikgu Ramlah because there was rubbish on his desk. But there were other students who played a prank on him by throwing rubbish on his desk.
examples.ms: "Kasihan dia, tidak tahu apa-apa tiba-tiba dimarahi begitu sahaja," Wak Sali memberitahu kami mengenai Bah Meran yang dimarahi oleh Cikgu Ramlah kerana terdapat sampah di mejanya. Tetapi terdapat pelajar lain yang menganiaya beliau dengan membuang sampah ke mejanya.

examples.semai: "Agok main lumpat-lumpat, doh tesilap engkejer," atok kipasal nu jik.
examples.en: "Don't jump around, you might fall," grandfather told us.
examples.ms: "Jangan bermain lompat-lompat, nanti tersilap kalian boleh terjatuh," datuk berkata kepada kami.

examples.semai: "Ihat iluniu bas kaha-hol, hik ya lingah hiha-et nu kerjak hunen," Bah Wira kimengeloh nu ikekawat.
examples.en: "The bus is slow coming, we are already late to get to work now," Bah Wira complained to his friends.
examples.ms: "Lambatnya bas mahu datang, kita sudah terlambat mahu ke tempat kerja sekarang," Bah Wira mengeluh pada rakan-rakannya.

examples.semai: Bah Mali kikerjak sebegei pemandu luri.
examples.en: Bah Mali works as a truck driver.
examples.ms: Bah Mali berkerja sebagai pemandu lori.

examples.semai: Kedei pelek biasajeh ku tepi lurong.
examples.en: The customary fruit shop is on the side of the road.
examples.ms: Kedai buah biasa yang terdapat di tepi lorong.

examples.semai: Sog Bah Tam luros, tapi sog imenang kerinteng.
examples.en: Bah Tam's hair was straight, but his sister's hair was curly.
examples.ms: Rambut Bah Tam lurus, tetapi rambut adiknya kerinting.

examples.semai: Ikui lut medei kiyog ku kemil batu.
examples.en: His head became swollen because he fell on a rock.
examples.ms: Kepalanya membengkak kerana terjatuh di atas batu.

examples.semai: Ma igah ?
examples.en: How are you? (lit. What is the news?)
examples.ms: Apa khabar?

examples.semai: Bah Sarip kisemanj maap ku Bah Aris ha ubai begadoh jihnek.
examples.en: Bah Sarip asked Bah Aris for forgiveness because they had been squabbling just beforehand.
examples.ms: Bah Sarip meminta maaf kepada Bah Aris kerana mereka bergaduh sebentar tadi.

examples.semai: "Tugas mabek keral, bior terbor kak, pog ru sayo. Tugas mabek kerdor, bior berencet. Tugas mabek bujang, bior siksuj," tok penghulu kipasal tugas-tugas jik mase caknak teniba Menteri Besar nu kampug jik ku gecek keknit doh.
examples.en: "The job of the men is to clean and prepare the fish, the chicken and the vegetables. The job of the women is to cook. The job of the unmarried is to wash all the dishes and utensils," the village chief told each group our duties during the feast in conjunction with the visitation of the Chief Minister to our village next month.
examples.ms: "Tugas golongan lelaki adalah menyiang ikan, ayam dan sayur. Tugas golongan perempuan adalah memasak. Tugas golongan bujang adalah mencuci segala pinggan dan mangkuk," tok penghulu memberitahu tugas-tugas kami semasa kenduri sempena ketibaan Menteri Besar ke kampung kami pada bulan hadapan.

senses.definition_en: bachang, horse mango, a type of fruit like mango that has a very strong smell
senses.definition_ms: bacang; sejenis buah seperti mangga yang mempunyai bau yang amat kuat dan isinya bersabut

examples.semai: Pelek macag keer irasa.
examples.en: Horse mango tastes sour.
examples.ms: Buah bacang rasanya masam.

examples.semai: Ku pasar tani mong macam-macam jenis sayo bijual.
examples.en: There are various types of vegetables sold in farmers' markets.
examples.ms: Terdapat pelbagai jenis sayur dijual di pasar tani.

examples.semai: Kenon kucig ilei pai yos ajeh macot ru kemek.
examples.en: The newly born kitten is small and cute.
examples.ms: Anak kucing yang baru lahir itu kecil dan comel.

examples.semai: Madu ceet irasa.
examples.en: Honey tastes sweet.
examples.ms: Madu manis rasanya.

senses.definition_en: to rush; to be in a hurry

examples.semai: Bah Rizal kimagij kaha-et nu ikerejak.
examples.en: Bah Risal was in a hurry to go to work.
examples.ms: Bah Risal tergesa-gesa mahu ke tempat kerja.

senses.definition_en: person or people belonging to a district or country

examples.semai: "Ju ipenakei ru icare, ipanei kek ajeh mai ju bandar," Wak Nani kipasal nu Wak Jamilah ha pelajar pai ku kelas enai.
examples.en: "From her clothes and the way she acts, we know that she is a person from the city," Wak Nani told Wak Jamilah about the new students in their class.
examples.ms: "Dari pakaiannya dan gerak-gerinya, kita tahu bahawa dia itu ialah penghuni dari bandar," Wak Nani memberitahu Wak Jamilah berkenaan pelajar baharu di kelas mereka.

examples.semai: Cekgu kelas eng mai Cina.
examples.en: My class's teacher is from the Chinese race.
examples.ms: Guru kelas saya berbangsa Cina.

examples.semai: Mai jengoi ateh tengah nai jala kak.
examples.en: A lot of people are fishing.
examples.ms: Orang ramai itu sedang menjala ikan.

senses.definition_en: "our people"; expression by the Semai to call their own race; Indigenous people; Orang Asli
senses.definition_ms: orang kita; panggilan oleh Orang Semai kepada bangsa sendiri; Orang Asli

examples.semai: "Kek ajeh mai ma? Ngtanya medei irenis pek begei ha mai hik, tapi buleh kibelwal engrok hik," Wak Hani kitanya nu Bah Tam.
examples.en: "What is her race? I am asking because she does not look like the our people, but she can speak our language," Wak Hani asked Bah Tam.
examples.ms: "Dia orang apa? Saya bertanya kerana rupanya tidak seperti orang kita Orang Asli, tetapi dia boleh bercakap dalam bahasa kita," Wak Hani bertanya kepada Bah Tam.

examples.semai: Wak Risa kien ikekenon main ku taman permainan jap-jap dui.
examples.en: Wak Risa brings her children to play in the children's playground every evening.
examples.ms: Wak Risa membawa anak-anaknya bermain di taman permainan kanak-kanak pada setiap petang.

examples.semai: "Patutle ngrasa relahej ku berog eng, paknya neh mong maj," Bah Jamil kipasal nu ikenah.
examples.en: "I should feel my body itching, apparently there are chicken mites on my body," Bah Jamil told his wife.
examples.ms: "Patutlah saya rasa badan saya gatal-gatal, rupa-rupanya terdapat hama ayam pada badan saya," Bah Jamil memberitahu isterinya.

examples.semai: "Agok pej sampah nu majeh-manen, eng pai ngsapu!" tenek eng kiles memenang eng.
examples.en: "Don't throw litter everywhere, I have just swept the floor!" My older sister scolded my younger siblings.
examples.ms: "Jangan buang sampah merata-rata, saya baru menyapu!" kakak saya memarahi adik-adik saya.

senses.definition_en: getting more or better, changing increasingly or progressively

examples.semai: Bunga de ngcet ajeh gumakin entoi.
examples.en: The flowers I planted are getting progressively bigger.
examples.ms: Bunga yang saya tanam itu semakin membesar.

examples.semai: Bah Rani bior jog madeg ya iamek, tapi kek kicip nij nu makgat.
examples.en: Bah Rani was told to go home by his mother, but he still went elsewhere.
examples.ms: Bah Rani disuruh untuk pulang ke rumah oleh ibunya, tetapi dia masih pergi ke tempat lain.

examples.semai: "Jinjeg makgat, doh kena habok awat adeh," apak kiurok nu menang eng de kijinjeg rek mase apak jik kigergaji awat kaha-beh deg pog.
examples.en: "Stand somewhere else, you will be exposed to this bamboo dust," father said to my brother who was standing too close to our father while he sawed the bamboo to make a chicken coop.
examples.ms: "Berdiri ke tempat lain, nanti terkena habuk buluh ini," bapa berkata kepada adik saya yang berdiri hampir dengan bapa kami semasa dia menggergaji buluh bagi membuat reban ayam.

examples.semai: Bah Sarul pek kipanei makne de biajar ya icikgu ajeh neh.
examples.en: Bah Sarul does not know the meaning of the things taught by his teacher just now.
examples.ms: Bah Sarul tidak tahu makna perkara yang diajar oleh cikgunya sebentar tadi.

examples.semai: "Ya merip gencek hamakok?" Wak Ramlah kitanya nu Wak Nani.
examples.en: "How many months have you been pregnant?" Wak Ramlah asked Wak Nani.
examples.ms: "Sudah berapa bulan kamu mengandung?" Wak Ramlah bertanya kepada Wak Nani.

senses.definition_ms: maksud; erti; tujuan; hajat; kehendak; niat

examples.semai: "Ma maksot hek habual begei ajeh?" Bah Selah kitanya nu ikenah.
examples.en: "What do you mean by that?" Bah Selah asked his wife.
examples.ms: "Apa maksud kamu berkata sedemikian?" Bah Selah bertanya kepada isterinya.

examples.semai: "Eng pernah ngburu malikat!" Bah Jali kiurok begei ajeh kaha-beseluro ru ikekawat.
examples.en: "I've seen angels before!" Bah Jali said this because he wanted to joke with his friends.
examples.ms: "Saya pernah melihat malaikat!" Bah Jali berkata sedemikian kerana mahu bergurau dengan kawan-kawannya.

examples.semai: "Malok hek dek arap eng neh?" Wak Nee kitanya nu Wak Wajah.
examples.en: "Where did you put my stuff earlier?" Wak Nee asked Wak Wajah.
examples.ms: "Di mana kamu menyimpan barang saya tadi?" Wak Nee bertanya kepada Wak Wajah.

examples.semai: "Mase jik jitengroj, jik jiburu mamek kilalu ku englag teu. Teros jijog madeg," amek kipasal nu ajok jik.
examples.en: "While we were fishing, we saw a tiger pass by on the other side of the river. We immediately went home," my mother told our grandmother.
examples.ms: "Semasa kami memancing, kami melihat seekor harimau sedang lalu di seberang sungai. Kami segera pulang ke rumah," ibu memberitahu nenek kami.

examples.semai: Eng mamek bile ngngot penglai adeh.
examples.en: This medicine suits me.
examples.ms: Ubat ini serasi dengan saya.

examples.semai: Mambek sanget naigemar man brencep-brencep.
examples.en: Kids love to play hide-and-seek.
examples.ms: Kanak-kanak suka bermain sorok-sorok.

senses.definition_en: thing or animal that one takes care of, as a pet

examples.semai: Bah Jali mong kidek man kenon rau.
examples.en: Bah Jali keeps a baby monkey as a pet.
examples.ms: Bah Jali menyimpan anak kera sebagai haiwan peliharaan.

examples.semai: Wak Salmah kitod baju-baju de ya manah ru repot.
examples.en: Wak Salmah burned old and decaying clothes.
examples.ms: Wak Salmah membakar pakaian yang sudah lama dan mereput.

examples.semai: Wah Milah ajeh ya liu kimanang.
examples.en: Wah Milah has long been barren.
examples.ms: Wah Milah sudah lama menjadi mandul.

examples.semai: Ku kemil pelog ajeh jeoi deg maneng.
examples.en: There are many spider webs on the roof.
examples.ms: Di atas bumbung itu terdapat banyak sarang labah-labah.

examples.semai: Sentak mangai ajeh bebisa.
examples.en: The scorpion's tail is very venomous.
examples.ms: Ekor kala jengking sangat berbisa.

examples.semai: "Pelek mangge de bicet ya apak adeh keer," Bah Wan kiurok nu iamek.
examples.en: "The mango that my father planted is sour," Bah Wan told his mother.
examples.ms: "Buah mangga yang ditanam oleh ayah ini masam," Bah Wan berkata kepada ibunya.

examples.semai: Mangges adeh ceet irasa.
examples.en: This mangosteen tastes sweet.
examples.ms: Buah manggis ini rasanya manis.

examples.semai: Manghel de bebisa adeh ilei de besentol.
examples.en: Poisonous spiders are hairy ones.
examples.ms: Labah-labah yang berbisa adalah labah-labah yang berbulu.

examples.semai: Wak Ramlah tesilap kicereh mangkok kaca mase kisiksuj, mangkok ajeh yog ju iteg de selej ya sabon.
examples.en: Wak Ramlah mistakenly broke the bowl while washing the dishes. The bowl fell from her hands which were slippery because of the soap.
examples.ms: Wak Ramlah tersilap memecahkan mangkuk kaca semasa mencuci pinggan. Mangkuk tersebut jatuh dari tangannya yang licin kerana sabun.

examples.semai: Yah ajeh kimanik lebat ku Langkap.
examples.en: It rained heavily in Langkap today.
examples.ms: Hari ini hujan lebat di Langkap.

examples.semai: Jik sanget manah jigemar muh teu manik.
examples.en: When we were little kids, we liked playing in rain.
examples.ms: Kami kecil-kecil dulu suka mandi air hujan.

examples.semai: "Seumur sinui eng pek pernah ngneng manik relog, had pernah ngbakek ku TV taleh," ajok eng kipasal nu jik mase tengah jineng TV.
examples.en: "All my life I have never seen hail, only seen it on TV," my grandmother told us while we were watching TV.
examples.ms: "Seumur hidup saya tidak pernah melihat hujan batu, cuma pernah melihatnya di kaca TV sahaja," nenek saya memberitahu kepada kami semasa kami sedang menonton TV.

senses.definition_en: to perform a Semai custom which is the event that a man sleeps for 3 days at a house of a woman who he intends to marry
senses.definition_ms: melakukan adat Orang Semai iaitu peristiwa dimana lelaki tidur di rumah perempuan yang dia berniat untuk kahwini selama 3 hari

examples.semai: "Keral tenek eng ya kihol nu madeg jik kaha-manjat ha tenek eng," Bah Deli kipasal nu jik.
examples.en: "My sister's boyfriend has come to our house to sleep with my sister," Bah Deli told us.
examples.ms: "Teman lelaki kakak saya sudah datang ke rumah kami untuk tidur kakak saya," Bah Deli memberitahu kepada kami.

examples.semai: Bah Sani adeh kenon manja.
examples.en: Bah Sani is a spoiled child.
examples.ms: Bah Sani adalah anak manja.

examples.semai: Muh manok Wah Enje ajeh, Wah Ida.
examples.en: Wak Enje's sister-in-law's name is Wak Ida.
examples.ms: Nama kakak ipar Wak Enje ialah Wak Ida.

senses.definition_en: rattan manau, a type of rattan

examples.semai: Apak eng kikek cog manou ku jeres, kaha-jual kaha-berkep duet.
examples.en: My father looked for rattan manau in the forest to sell it to earn money.
examples.ms: Ayah saya mencari rotan manau di hutan bagi menjualnya untuk mendapatkan wang.

examples.semai: Manusia ku bumi adeh bemacam-macam bangsa ru engrok memaség.
examples.en: Humans on this earth are made up of many different tribes and their respective languages.
examples.ms: Manusia di bumi ini terdiri bermacam suku bangsa dan bahasa masing-masing.

senses.definition_ms: saiz; sebaya; ukuran berkenaan besar atau kecilnya sesuatu benda seperti pakaian; tubuh badan atau objek;

examples.semai: "Mar belok hek hakep kak lampap cinek?" Bah Gani kitanya nu Bah Rilan.
examples.en: "How big is the lampam fish that you caught earlier?" Bah Gani asked Bah Rilan.
examples.ms: "Sebesar mana ikan lampam yang kamu dapat tadi?" Bah Gani bertanya kepada Bah Rilan.

senses.definition_en: to flare up (of a flame); to spread (of fire)
senses.definition_ms: marak (api yang sedang membakar dengan kuat dan besar nyalaannya)

examples.semai: Bah Man kitod sampah, tapi pek kisedar ios ajeh ya gumaken marak ku tempat kilek.
examples.en: Bah Man burned the rubbish, but he did not realize the fire was spreading to other places.
examples.ms: Bah Man membakar sampah, tetapi dia tidak menyedari api tersebut semakin marak ke tempat yang lain.

examples.semai: Bah Selah ru Bah Rilan segera ubai jar bile ubai bakek dil marak mase baiha-kek awat.
examples.en: Bah Selah and Bah Rilan immediately ran after seeing the tiger's footprints while they were going to look for bamboo.
examples.ms: Bah Selah dan Bah Rilan segera berlari setelah melihat tapak kaki harimau semasa pergi mahu mencari buluh.

examples.semai: Wak Laila kikep mas hihadiah ya igensir.
examples.en: Wak Laila received a gold ring as a gift from her husband.
examples.ms: Wak Laila mendapat emas dihadiahi oleh suaminya.

examples.semai: Wak Nani kimasak canak, tarog ru labu ha caknak tengah arik.
examples.en: Wak Nani cooked rice, tapioca shoots and pumpkin for lunch.
examples.ms: Wak Nani memasak nasi, pucuk ubi kayu dan labu bagi makanan tengah hari.

examples.semai: Wak Rima mong masaalah ru ibos ku tempat kerjak, sebab ajeh ya seminggu pek kihol kerjak.
examples.en: Wak Rima has a problem with her boss at work, that is why she has not been to work for a week.
examples.ms: Wak Rima mempunyai masalah dengan bosnya di tempat kerja, itulah sebabnya dia sudah seminggu tidak pergi kerja.

examples.semai: Mase senanget jik entem ihad galeh mengasak jihuj jehuk ru jik mamuh ku teu batas.
examples.en: When we were young, we were very naughty, often climbed trees and bathed in the river.

examples.semai: Mambek sanget maseg-maseg biog bob dea naibebaca.

examples.semai: Masjid adeh tempat ha mai Islam naisembahyang.

examples.semai: Mat kuceg becahya amen bisog ya lampu ku arik kenglem.

examples.semai: Wak Nira pek kisedar mong mat lada seksog ku ilemunj. Bile ya bimur ya ikawat, baruleh kiperhol mat lada ajeh.
examples.en: Wak Nira did not notice that there were pepper seeds stuck between her teeth. When her friend chided her, only then did she remove the pepper seed.
examples.ms: Wak Nira tidak perasan terdapat biji lada yang tersangkut di celah giginya. Bila ditegur oleh kawannya, barulah dia mengeluarkan biji lada tersebut.

examples.en: "Today it is hot and sunny because there are no clouds," our grandmother said to my mother as they were weeding the garden.
examples.ms: "Hari ini panas disirami cahaya matahari kerana (langit) tidak mempunyai awan," nenek kami berkata kepada ibu semasa mereka mencabut rumput di kebun.

examples.semai: Mata tarok ajeh ihad tajap.
examples.en: The spear's blade is very sharp.

senses.definition_en: to the river; towards the river

examples.ms: Bunyi siamang adalah kuat, dari kejauhan pun kita boleh mendengar bunyinya. Walaupun ia di hutan dan kita di kampung, kita masih boleh mendengar bunyinya.

senses.definition_ms: mayat; jenazah; tubuh badan yang sudah tidak bernyawa

examples.semai: Mai tengroj naiburu mayat ku engkap semak.
examples.en: Anglers found a corpses in the thicket.

examples.semai: Wah Rita kiyog medei ha itik ajeh selej.

senses.definition_ms: nama; panggilan untuk sesuatu (orang, benda, binatang dsbnya)

examples.semai: Bah Risal kimek ha Wak Rissa.

senses.definition_ms: pokok kesing, pokok pijat, pokok cemomok; halia pepijat

senses.definition_ms: perawan; anak dara; anak dara sunti

senses.definition_en: to be located; to have; to exist

examples.semai: Ku Kuala Lumpur mong jeoi tempat kek de bor-bor, kek de buleh hiroh.
examples.en: In Kuala Lumpur there are many interesting places we can visit.

examples.semai: "Apak jop ru amek jop eng lekat mong, tapi ubai ya engrak bernor," kiberlag ya Wak Nola bile bitanya ya ikawat kerjak.
examples.en: "My grandparents are still alive, but they are very old," Wak Nola replied when asked by a colleague.
examples.ms: "Datuk dan nenek saya masih hidup, tetapi mereka sudah amat tua," dijawab oleh Wak Nola bila ditanyai oleh kawan sekerjanya.

senses.definition_ms: mop; sejenis penyapu untuk mengelap, membasuh lantai dan diperbuat dari lilitan benang-benang kain dan kayu digunakan sebagai batang pemegangnya

examples.semai: "Amen haet nu kedei, tulog beli jehuk mop. Ilei de manah ya begot," Wak Gina kipasal nu igensir.
examples.en: "If you go to the store, please buy a mop handle. The old one is broken," Wak Gina told her husband.
examples.ms: "Jika kamu ke kedai, tolong belikan batang mop. Batang mop yang lama sudah patah," Wak Gina memberitahu kepada suaminya.

examples.semai: Wak Sali tengah kimop ideg mase nghol nu majeh.
examples.en: Wak Sali was mopping her house when I arrived there.
examples.ms: Wak Sali sedang mengemop rumahnya semasa saya datang ke situ.

senses.definition_en: serow, a type of wild goat that lives in the forests
senses.definition_ms: kambing gurun, sejenis kambing liar yang tinggal di dalam hutan tebal

examples.semai: "Kelem jiknek eng ngcerengai engrok mor ju jeres ku belakang deg jik," Bah Jali kipasal nu ikekawat.
examples.en: "Last night I heard the sound of a serow from the forest behind our house," Bah Jali told his friends.
examples.ms: "Malam tadi saya mendengar bunyi kambing gurun dari hutan di belakang rumah kami," Bah Jali memberitahu kepada rakan-rakannya.

examples.semai: Entem, mase pekseg mong teu pili, jik jimuh ku teu perigi.
examples.en: In the past, when there was no tap water, we bathed in well water.
examples.ms: Dahulu, semasa belum ada air paip, kami mandi di air perigi.

examples.semai: "Muh eng Wak Rosni," pelajar pai ku kelas jik kipekenal idiri.
examples.en: "My name is Wak Rosni," said a new student in our class as she introduced herself.
examples.ms: "Nama saya Wak Rosni," pelajar baharu di kelas kami memperkenalkan dirinya.

examples.semai: Mai ku kampug selalo naicak muj jeer ru muj sawét. Tapi, mai de gigei ku pekan hajap naiha-berkep muj adeh.
examples.en: People who live in the village always eat coconut pith or the pith from palm tree trunks. But, people who live in the town find it quite difficult to get the pith to eat.
examples.ms: Orang yang tinggal di kampung selalu memakan umbut kelapa atau umbut dari batang pokok sawit. Tetapi, orang-orang yang tinggal di pekan agak sukar untuk mendapat umbut untuk dimakan.

examples.semai: "Beileh muj nu madeg!" apak kijempot ikawat nu madeg.
examples.en: "Come into the house!" the father invited his friend.
examples.ms: "Marilah masuk ke rumah!" bapa menjemput rakannya ke rumah.

examples.semai: Lumbe meskat Tour de Langkawi kimula ju Kuala Lumpur lei nu Langkawi.
examples.en: The Tour de Langkawi bicycle race starts from Kuala Lumpur and ends at Langkawi.
examples.ms: Perlumbaan basikal Tour de Langkawi bermula dari Kuala Lumpur sehingga ke Langkawi.

examples.semai: Lima ikor kenon cok naimumem ku ikeneng.
examples.en: Five puppies are suckling from their mother.
examples.ms: Lima ekor anak anjing sedang menyusu pada ibu mereka.

senses.definition_en: disloyal, not keeping promises or agreements

examples.semai: "Neeng ajeh, mong bende biyeg begei ha abat langser ku kemil jehuk ajeh!" Wak Nira kimur.
examples.en: "Look, there's a white object like a curtain on the tree!" Wak Nira pointed out.
examples.ms: "Lihat, ada benda putih seperti kain langsir di atas pokok tersebut!" Wak Nira menegur.

examples.semai: "Tok penghulu kiog bantuan ju kerajaan had mur nu peringak ilei taleh," Bah Aman kiurok ku mase mesyuarat kampug.
examples.en: "The headman distributed the aids from the government only to his own family members," Bah Aman said in the village's meeting.
examples.ms: "Tok penghulu membahagikan bantuan dari kerajaan cuma hanya kepada ahli keluarganya sahaja," Bah Aman berkata semasa mesyuarat kampung.

examples.semai: Cikgu kiajar imureb benaca.
examples.en: The teacher teaches her students to read.
examples.ms: Cikgu mengajar murid-muridnya membaca.

examples.semai: Hunen musem pelek ku jap-jap kampug.
examples.en: Now is the fruit season in every village.
examples.ms: Sekarang adalah musim buah-buahan di setiap kampung.

examples.semai: Mase cuti sekulah padehjeh, Bah Zam kien ikenon-kenah cekcip nu musium.
examples.en: During the school holidays, Bah Zam took his wife and children to the museum.
examples.ms: Semasa cuti sekolah tempoh hari, Bah Zam membawa anak-anak dan isterinya berjalan-jalan ke muzium.

examples.semai: Entem, mase ku jaman perag, musoh hik ajeh mai Jepon.
examples.en: In the past, during the war, our enemies were the Japanese.
examples.ms: Dahulu, semasa zaman perperangan, musuh kita adalah orang Jepun.

examples.semai: "Hik pek buleh hibemusoh ru mai kilek," atok jik kibesat nu jik mase jik lekat jisanget entem.
examples.en: "We can't be hostile to other people," our grandfather told us when we were kids.
examples.ms: "Kita tidak boleh bermusuhan dengan orang lain," datuk kami berpesan kepada kami sewaktu kami masih kanak-kanak dahulu.

senses.definition_en: to tap rubber to collect latex
senses.definition_ms: menoreh getah dengan cara memotong kulit pokok getah

examples.semai: Jap pegelap amek ru tenek eng naiet nu mutong.
examples.en: Every morning, my mother and older sister go rubber tapping.
examples.ms: Pada setiap pagi, ibu dan kakak saya pergi menoreh getah.

examples.semai: Bah Wali kien mutu nu ikerjak.
examples.en: Bah Wali uses a motorcycle to go to work.
examples.ms: Bah Wali menggunakan motosikal ke tempat kerja.

examples.semai: Ubai Bah Benny naas ku nong timbok cinek.
examples.en: Bah Benny and his friend crashed on the road just now.
examples.ms: Bah Benny dan rakannya nahas di jalan raya sebentar tadi.

senses.definition_en: a prefix as a 3rd person plural (more than two) agreement marker for verb
senses.definition_ms: mereka; imbuhan awalan bagi 'mereka' ganti nama diri ketiga jamak (lebih dari dua) untuk kata kerja

examples.semai: "Naiha-et belok mambek ajeh?" Bah Padil kitanya nu ikenah sambel kineng ha ikekenon.
examples.en: "Where are they going?" Bah Padil asked his wife while looking at his children.
examples.ms: "Mereka hendak ke mana?" Bah Padil bertanya kepada isterinya sambil melihat kepada anak-anaknya.

senses.definition_ms: mendidih; menggelegak; meruap (cecair) kerana sudah panas.

examples.semai: "Teu ku cirek ajeh ya nam," Bah Jali kipasal nu ikenah.
examples.en: "The water in the kettle is already boiling," Bah Jali told his wife.
examples.ms: "Air yang di cerek tersebut sudah mendidih," Bah Jali memberitahu isterinya.

examples.semai: "Nanek ju empat ikor kenon kuceg biperyos ajeh ya dat," Bah Halei kipasal nu iamek.
examples.en: "One of the four kittens that was born dead," Bah Halei told his mother.
examples.ms: "Satu dari empat ekor anak kucing yang dilahirkan tersebut telah mati," Bah Halei memberitahu kepada ibunya.

examples.semai: Bah Gurek mong kicet nangkak ku ibelakang deg.
examples.en: Bah Gurek is planting jackfruit in the backyard.
examples.ms: Bah Gurek ada menanam nangka di belakang rumahnya.

examples.semai: Mat Bah Gani as bisej ya naning.
examples.en: Bah Gani's eye was swollen because it was stung by a giant honey bee.
examples.ms: Mata Bah Gani bengkak disengat oleh lebah tualang.

senses.definition_en: greater mouse-deer; a type of mouse-deer that is large and lives in low areas.
senses.definition_ms: napuh; sejenis pelanduk yang bersaiz besar dan tinggal di kawasan yang rendah.

examples.semai: Bah Jali kiberkep napoh mase kiet kidendep ku darat.
examples.en: Bah Jali got a greater mouse-deer while going hunting in the forest.
examples.ms: Bah Jali mendapatkan napuh semasa pergi memburu di hutan.

examples.semai: Mong nar urag sengoi dat bikap ya mergas ku jeres yah ajeh nek.
examples.en: Two people were devoured by tigers in the forest today.
examples.ms: Terdapat dua orang mati yang dibaham oleh harimau di hutan hari ini.

examples.semai: "Naseb mong hek halalu ku padeh, amen tok mesti jisusah," engrok Bah Wan de dij iminyak kerite nu Bah Gani de buleh kitulog beli petrol ha kek.
examples.en: "Fortunately you are using this road too, otherwise we would be in trouble," Bah Wan who had run out of car fuel told to Bah Gani who could help buy petrol for him.
examples.ms: "Mujur kamu ada melalui jalan ini, jika tidak kami mesti akan mengalami kesusahan," Bah Wan yang kehabisan minyak kereta berkata kepada Bah Gani yang boleh menolong membeli petrol bagi beliau.

senses.definition_en: rice flour applied to the body to cure diseases after an incantation has been spoken over it
senses.definition_ms: tepung beras yang telah dijampi yang disapu pada badan bagi mengubati penyakit

examples.semai: "Mase jik lekat jisanget, amek jik selalo kikot gek cengroi ru kigerlet cengroi ajeh lei kijadi tepong. Telas ajeh tepong ajeh bijampi dea bigep ku berog ha perembor nyaknik," amek kicerite nu jik ikekenon.
examples.en: "When we were children, our mother often took some rice and grinded the rice into flour. After that, an incantation was spoken over the flour so that it could be applied to the body to cure diseases," the mother told us, her children.
examples.ms: "Semasa kami masih kanak-kanak, ibu kami sering mengambil sedikit beras dan menggiling beras tersebut sehingga menjadi tepung. Selepas itu tepung tersebut dijampi supaya boleh disapu pada badan bagi mengubati penyakit," ibu bercerita kepada kami, anak-anaknya.

senses.definition_ms: negara; sesebuah kerajaan yang mempunyai raja, pemimpin atau pemerintah untuk mentadbir rakyat dan segala yang ada di dalamnya
