examples.semai: Negare hik Malaysia adeh ama nru damei.
examples.en: Our country Malaysia is peaceful.
examples.ms: Negara kita Malaysia adalah aman dan damai.

senses.definition_en: particle suffix that strengthens the meaning of the base word
senses.definition_ms: -lah; partikel pada akhir kata yang menguatkan maksud perkataan yang berimbuhan dengannya

examples.semai: "Pai adeh neh nglei," kiberlag ya Bah Hari bile bitanya bile kilei nu majeh.
examples.en: "I just arrived a moment ago," Bah Hari replied when asked when did he got to the place.
examples.ms: "Baharu sebentar ini tadi saya sampai," Bah Hari membalas apabila ditanya bilakah dia sampai ke tempat tersebut.

examples.semai: "Adehle neh isengoi de kicereh pasu jen," Bah Samsul kipasal nu iamek ru kiternyol nu imenang.
examples.en: "This is the person who broke your vase," Bah Samsul told his mother and pointed a finger at his younger brother.
examples.ms: "Inilah dia orangnya yang memecahkan pasu bunga kamu," Bah Samsul memberitahu kepada ibunya dan menuding jari kepada adiknya.

senses.definition_en: generic word for all things ugly or bad
senses.definition_ms: perkataan generik bagi semua perkara yang buruk atau tidak elok

examples.semai: "Ihat nej perangei hek adeh," Bah Gop kiurok nu ikenon.
examples.en: "You have a very bad attitude," Bah Gop said to his son.
examples.ms: "Sangat buruk perangai kamu," Bah Gop berkata kepada anaknya.

examples.semai: "Nejlo baju ajeh ku hek, pek kena ngneng," Wak Jamilah kipasal nu itenek.
examples.en: "The shirt does not become you, I see it does not suit you," Wak Jamilah told her older sister.
examples.ms: "Baju itu tidak cantik pada kamu, saya melihat ianya tidak padan dengan kamu," Wak Jamilah memberitahu kepada kakaknya.

examples.semai: "Dikdij mai naiurok sempak ajeh sedap, tapi eng ngrasa nèc!" Bah Tan kiurok.
examples.en: "Everyone says durian is delicious, but I don't think so!" Bah Tan said.
examples.ms: "Semua orang berkata durian adalah sedap, tetapi saya rasa tidak sedap!" Bah Tan berkata.

examples.semai: "Ajeh nek hek haet nu belok?" apak kitanya nu tenek eng.
examples.en: "Where did you go just now?" father asked my older brother.
examples.ms: "Sebentar tadi kamu ke mana?" bapa bertanya kepada abang saya.

examples.semai: Wak Mia kikek ha beleg tapi kikep had nek nukebek taleh.
examples.en: Wak Mia looked for betel nuts but got only one.
examples.ms: Wak Mia mencari buah pinang tetapi mendapat hanya sebiji sahaja.

senses.definition_en: for 'doer' and to indicate one's inclination
senses.definition_ms: bagi menunjukkan kecenderungan seseorang; bagi orang yang sering melakukan aksi kata kerja berikut

examples.semai: "Bah Aru neklenglod ru Bah Risau nekbelnel. Wak Sanggop nij nekbejawab engrok mai engrak. Hat Bah Gali kihalei taleh de nekjinos engrok mai engrak," Wak Salmah kimerungut ha ikekenon nu igensir.
examples.en: "Bah Aru likes to tell lies and Bah Risau is a drunkard. Wak Sanggup likes to talk back to his parents. Only Bah Gali likes to listen to his parents' words," Wak Salmah complained about her children to her husband.
examples.ms: "Bah Aru suka menipu dan Bah Risau adalah pemabuk. Wak Sanggup pula suka menjawab perkara yang dikatakan oleh orang tua. Hanya Bah Gali seorang sahaja yang suka mendengar kata-kata orang tua," Wak Salmah merungut tentang anak-anaknya kepada suaminya.

examples.semai: Bah Ari kien ikenon sanget neng kak ku kulam.
examples.en: Bah Ari brought his little boy to see the fish in the pond.
examples.ms: Bah Ari membawa anak kecilnya melihat ikan di kolam.

senses.definition_en: not to stop looking; to gaze; to stare

examples.semai: Bah Leman kinenneng ha kerdor ku piknoj bas ajeh, medei kirasa begei mong de pek kena ku kerdor ajeh. Paknyak neh, kerdor ajeh numom keral de kibeh ilei begei ha kerdor.
examples.en: Bah Lemah did not stop looking at the woman at the bus stop, because he felt there was something strange about her. Apparently the woman was a man behaving as if he were a woman.
examples.ms: Bah Lemah tidak putus-putus melihat perempuan di tempat perhentian bas tersebut, kerana dia merasakan terdapat sesuatu perkara yang pelik berkenaan dengan perempuan tersebut. Rupa-rupanya perempuan tersebut adalah seorang lelaki yang berkelakuan seperti seorang perempuan.

examples.semai: "Kineneng-neng ha TV, nanek kerjak ma langsong pek kibeh," amek kiles ha tenek kerdor eng.
examples.en: "You are watching TV non-stop, and not doing any work at all," my mother scolded my older sister.
examples.ms: "Kamu tidak putus-putus menonton TV sahaja, satu apa pun kerja kamu langsung tidak lakukan," ibu memarahi kakak saya.

senses.definition_en: ripe; condition of fruit that is ready to eat
senses.definition_ms: masak; keadaan buah yang sudah cukup masak dan boleh dipetik serta dimakan; buah yang sudah cukup matang dan dapat dituai

examples.semai: "Pelek betek ajeh ya nep. Kot en jog," ajok kipasal nu eng.
examples.en: "The papaya is ripe. Take it home," my grandmother told me.
examples.ms: "Buah betik itu sudah masak. Ambil bawa pulang ke rumahmu," nenek memberitahu kepada saya.

examples.semai: "Amen jooi dusa hik, doh mesti himuj nu neraka," apak Bah Wan kiserngoh ha icecenok.
examples.en: "If we have many sins, we will go to hell," Bah Wan's father said to frighten his grandchildren.
examples.ms: "Jika kita mempunyai banyak dosa, kita akan masuki neraka," bapa kepada Bah Wan menakut-nakutkan cucu-cucunya.

senses.definition_en: to show a sign with hand gesture, without a voice
senses.definition_ms: memberi isyarat dengan tangan, tanpa suara

examples.semai: Cekgu Azman kiog neuta ya iteg, kidek ijaras nu inyiyoi sebegei neuta kior pelajar-pelajar naikerakdik serakngek.
examples.en: Teacher Azman gestured with his hand, by putting his finger on his lips as a sign he was telling the students to be silent.
examples.ms: Cikgu Azman memberi isyarat dengan tangannya, dia meletakkan jari pada bibirnya sebagai tanda dia menyuruh pelajar-pelajar berdiam.

senses.definition_en: I; 1st person singular agreement marker for verb
senses.definition_ms: saya; imbuhan ganti nama diri pertama tunggal untuk kata kerja

examples.semai: "Eng nghagu-cak caknak mai Korea," Wak Jura kipasal nu igensir.
examples.en: "I really want to eat Korean food," Wak Jura told her husband.
examples.ms: "Saya terigin mahu memakan makanan orang Korea," Wak Jura memberitahu suaminya.

senses.definition_en: changing a descriptive verb to noun

examples.semai: Kenon Wak Gina kijap medei kisengoh ha ngak de kimuj nu madeg.
examples.en: Wak Gina's son cried out in fear of the beetles which were entering the house.
examples.ms: Anak Wak Gina menangis kerana takut terhadap kumbang yang memasuki ke dalam rumah.

senses.definition_en: name usually for the second child in a family
senses.definition_ms: (N-) panggilan atau gelaran nama yang mengikut turutan kelahiran untuk anak kedua dalam keluarga

examples.semai: "Tenek eng adeh imuh Wak Ngah medei ilei adehle de ingah ku kateh beradek eng," Bah Tam kipasal nu ikekawat.
examples.en: "My sister's name is Wak Ngah because she is the second child among my siblings," Bah Tam told his friends.
examples.ms: "Nama kakak saya ini adalah Wak Ngah kerana dialah anak yang kedua di kalangan adik-beradik saya," Bah Tam memberitahu kawan-kawannya.

examples.semai: Jog Wak Siti luka medei pek kibakek yoj de mong ku ngar ilei, tesilap kijebat yoj ajeh.
examples.en: Wak Siti's foot was injured because se did not see the knife that was in front of her, she mistakenly stepped on it.
examples.ms: Kaki Wak Siti terluka kerana dia tidak nampak pisau yang ada dihadapannya, dia tersilap memijak pisau tersebut.

examples.semai: Bah Ajoi kidek sekejap kak de kirag ku wal rangas, pek kisedar ikak ajeh ya ngej.
examples.en: Bah Ajoi left the fish he was grilling in the firewood stove for a moment,   as a result he did not realise when the fish became charred.
examples.ms: Bah Ajoi meninggalkan sekejap ikan yang dia bakar pada dapur kayu api, tidak dia sedari ikannya tersebut sudah hangus.

senses.definition_en: to escort; to accompany as an escort

examples.semai: Eng ngeng amek eng nu hospital.
examples.en: I escorted my mother to the hospital.
examples.ms: Saya hantar mak saya ke hospital.

examples.semai: Bah Hashim kingeng bob Wak Rani nu imadeg medei kisip ku sekulah cinek. Telaas ya kilei nu madeg doh baruleh kiperjog bob ajeh nu ilei.
examples.en: Bah Hashim brought Wak Rani's book to his house because she had left the book at school. Once he got home, he would return the book to her.
examples.ms: Bah Hashim membawa buku Wak Rani ke rumahnya kerana dia tertinggal buku tersebut di sekolah. Setelah dia sampai ke rumah, barulah dia akan memulangkan buku tersebut kepadanya.

examples.semai: "Tulog pej sampah ajeh ya hek, ingoi ya seeg," amek kiurok nu tenek keral eng.
examples.en: "Please throw away the rubbish, it smells bad," my mother said to my older brother.
examples.ms: "Tolong buang sampah tersebut, baunya sudah busuk," ibu berkata kepada abang saya.

examples.semai: "Ku belok habeli pewangi kerite adeh, sedap ingoi," Bah Hassan kitanya nu Bah Mizi.
examples.en: "Where did you buy this car perfume, it smells good," Bah Hassan asked Bah Mizi.
examples.ms: "Dimanakah kamu membeli pewangi kereta ini, harum baunya," Bah Hassan bertanya kepada Bah Mizi.

examples.semai: "Tulog kerngoi canak adeh ya hek, lekat borka ya barik? Eng ngkena sih, pek dapat ngkerngoi," Wak Rima kiurok nu igensir.
examples.en: "Please smell this rice, is it still good or stale? I have a cold, so I can't smell it," Wak Rima said to her husband.
examples.ms: "Tolong hidu nasi ini, masih elok atau sudah basi? Saya menghidap selsema, jadi tidak dapat menghidu," Wak Rima berkata kepada suaminya.

examples.semai: Wak Nira kingop ikui bile kilalu ku kerop cenglei.
examples.en: Wak Nira lowered her head when passing under the clothes line.
examples.ms: Wak Nira menundukkan kepalanya apabila lalu di bawah pengampaian pakaian.

examples.semai: Cok ajeh kingut teu lei jot ilehig.
examples.en: The dog drank water until he drooled.
examples.ms: Anjing tersebut meminum air sehingga air liurnya meleleh.

examples.semai: "Eng ngbual begei ajeh pek ngbeniat ngha-pernyik ha sengik hek. Jadi hunen, ngsemanj maap amen haterasam," Wak Timah kiurok nu Wak Tipah.
examples.en: "I didn't intend to hurt your feelings when I said that. So now, I apologize if you felt hurt," Wak Timah said to Wak Tipah.
examples.ms: "Saya berkata demikian bukan berniat untuk meyakiti hati kamu. Jadi sekarang, saya meminta maaf jika kamu terasa," Wak Timah berkata kepada Wak Tipah.

examples.semai: Wak Nira kicak nij bile kineng iapak kien jog jeoi caknak ju pasar malam, hamapen pai anoh nek kicakcak.
examples.en: Wak Nira ate again when she saw her father bring home a lot of food from the night market, even though she had only just eaten.
examples.ms: Wak Nira memakan lagi bila melihat bapanya membawa pulang banyak makanan dari pasar malam, walaupun baru sebentar ini sahaja dia telah makan.

examples.semai: Wak Sabah kitambah nij teu nu kateh sup ajeh medei kirasa nek gek taleh, kisengoh doh pek cukop.
examples.en: Wak Sabah added more water again to the soup because she felt that the soup was too little, she was worried it would not be enough.
examples.ms: Wak Sabah menambah lagi air ke dalam sup tersebut kerana beliau merasakan ianya hanya sedikit, dia kuatir ianya tidak akan mencukupi.

examples.semai: Wak Yaya mong nik urag imenang keral.
examples.en: Wak Yaya has three younger brothers.
examples.ms: Wak Yaya ada tiga orang adik lelaki.

senses.definition_ms: itu sahaja; cuma itu saja; hanya itu sahaja

examples.semai: "Hat aninen talehka cengroi de mong? Amen ya dij, ngha-beli nij," Bah Selan kitanya nu ikenah.
examples.en: "Is that all the rice that is left? If it runs out, I want to buy it again," Bah Selan asked his wife.
examples.ms: "Cuma itu sahajakan beras yang ada? Jika sudah habis, saya mahu membelinya lagi," Bah Selan bertanya kepada isterinya.

senses.definition_en: just this; only this; that's all
senses.definition_ms: hanya ini; cuma ini; sekadar ini (sahaja)

examples.semai: "Hooh, had aninoh taleh cengroi de mong, etleh beli nij," Wak Lela kiberlag ha tenanyak igensir.
examples.en: "Yes, that's all the rice thhat is left, go and buy some more," Wak Lela replied to her husband's question.
examples.ms: "Ya, cuma itu sahaja beras yang tertinggal, pergilah beli lagi," Wak Lela membalas pertanyaan suaminya.

examples.semai: Nik noh Bah Jetep kiet nu deg Bah Jamil, tapi lekat juga bok hentok de mong ku ideg.
examples.en: Bah Jetep went to Bah Jamil's house three times, but there was still no one at his house.
examples.ms: Tiga kali Bah Jetep pergi ke rumah Bah Jamil, tetapi masih tiada siapa yang ada di rumahnya.

examples.semai: "Nyoi amek nok sebelom haet nu sekulah," Wak Ramlah kiurok nu ikenon.
examples.en: "Kiss me first before you go to school," Wak Ramlah said to her son.
examples.ms: "Cium ibu dahulu sebelum kamu ke sekolah," Wak Ramlah berkata kepada anaknya.

examples.semai: Bah Wan kisingah sarapan canuk ku kedei mamak sebelom kiet nu itempat kerjak.
examples.en: Bah Wan stopped for breakfast at the mamak restaurant first before going to work.
examples.ms: Bah Wan singgah sarapan di kedai mamak terlebih dahulu sebelum pergi ke tempat kerja.

examples.semai: Wak Mila kilap nom imenang de kaha-nanom pek kipasal canuk.
examples.en: Wak Mila wiped up her little brother's urine when he did not tell her that he wanted to urinate.
examples.ms: Wak Mila mengelap air kencing adiknya yang tidak memberitahu semasa mahu terkencing.

examples.semai: "Hacip nong belok?" Han Tira kitanya ha igensir.
examples.en: "Where do you want to go?" Han Tira asked her husband.
examples.ms: "Kamu mahu ke mana?" Han Tira bertanya kepada suaminya.

examples.semai: Nong ku Rumpaian Laut lecah.
examples.en: The road to Rumpaian Laut is muddy.
examples.ms: Jalan ke Rumpaian Laut berlumpur.

examples.semai: "Nyik nos eng ngneng perangei enai ajeh," Wak Mila kiurok nu ikekawat ha mabek sanget keral de nairahnyah ku kateh kelas.
examples.en: "It makes me angry to see their behaviour," Wak Mila told her friends about the male students making a noise in the classroom.
examples.ms: "Sakit hati saya melihat kelakuan mereka," Wak Mila berkata kepada rakan-rakannya berkenaan pelajar-pelajar lelaki yang membuat bising di dalam kelas.

examples.semai: Bah Tuas kijog nu deg iamek ku mase kicuti ju ikerjak.
examples.en: Bah Tuas went back to his mother's house while he was on leave from work.
examples.ms: Bah Tuas pulang ke rumah ibunya semasa dia bercuti dari kerjanya.

examples.semai: Nuhenglei ju abat de bitil ya Wak Kila ya jer nu matik.
examples.en: One piece of the clothes that being hang by Wak Kila to dry under the sun had fallen to the ground.
examples.ms: Sehelai dari pakaian yang dijemur oleh Wak Kila telah jatuh ke tanah.

examples.semai: "Dek nukebek ju sempak de jenkep ajeh, eng ngha-og nu supervisor ku tempat kerjak eng," Wak Tila kipasal nu iapak.
examples.en: "Keep one of the durian you have got, I want to give it to the supervisor at my workplace," Wak Tila told his father.
examples.ms: "Simpan sebiji dari durian yang kamu dapat tersebut, saya mahu berikannya kepada penyelia di tempat kerja saya," Wak Tila memberitahu kepada bapanya.

examples.semai: "Ku kateh nukember mat taleh cep ajeh ya kiheg, pek sempat ngha-kot igambar," Wak Salwa kipasal nu igensir.
examples.en: "In the blink of an eye, the bird has flown, I did not have time to take a picture," Wak Salwa told her husband.
examples.ms: "Dalam sekelip mata sahaja burung tersebut sudah terbang, saya tidak sempat mengambil gambarnya," Wak Salwa memberitahu kepada suaminya.

examples.semai: "Gei nulok agok cengor," Wak Mila kiurok nu ikenon mase ubai ku katek bank, ubai poj giliran numbor ubai bicereg.
examples.en: "Say still, don't be naughty," Wak Mila said to her son while they were both in the bank, waiting for the queue number to be called.
examples.ms: "Duduk setempat jangan nakal," Wak Mila berkata kepada anaknya semasa mereka berdua di dalam bank, ketika menunggu nombor giliran untuk dipanggil.

examples.semai: "Eng kep numbor empat mase jernar ku sekulah cinek," Wak Para kipasal nu iapak.
examples.en: "I got the fourth place in the running training at the school earlier," Wak Para told her father.
examples.ms: "Saya dapat nombor empat dalam latihan lumba lari di sekolah tadi," Wak Para memberitahu kepada bapanya.

examples.semai: Bah Wan mong had numom taleh ikenon kerdor, kilek dij keral.
examples.en: Bah Wan has only one daughter, the rest are all boys.
examples.ms: Bah Wan mempunyai hanya seorang saja anak perempuan, yang lain semua lelaki.

senses.definition_en: one by one; one after another; one person after another

examples.semai: Bah Selah kibahgi pelek legos numom-penumom nu ikekenon.
examples.en: Bah Selah gave out the rambutans one by one to his children.
examples.ms: Bah Selah membahagikan buah rambutan seorang demi seorang kepada anak-anaknya.

examples.semai: eng
examples.en: "Sakit hati saya melihat perangai mereka berdua tersebut, di khalayak ramai mereka berdua berpelukan," Wak Sila berkata kepada Wak Sara berkenaan dengan kelakuan pasangan kekasih di perhentian bas tersebut.

examples.semai: Tempat kerenjak Bah Rani nyak ju bareh.
examples.en: Bah Rani's workplace is far from the town.
examples.ms: Tempat Bah Rani bekerja jauh dari pekan.

examples.semai: "Wesloh agok teh, pelek mangge ajeh lekat nyam. Pojle dea kinep nok," ajok kiurok nu jik.
examples.en: "Do not pick the mangoes, they are still unripe. Wait until they are fully ripe," grandmother told us.
examples.ms: "Janganlah memetik buah mangga tersebut, ianya masih muda. Tunggulah sehingga ianya masak dahulu," nenek berkata kepada kami.

examples.semai: Pelahat Wak Anis kinyam icanak medei ha pehod ilemunj.
examples.en: Wah Anis slowly chewed her food because her teeth ached.
examples.ms: Wah Anis perlahan-lahan mengunyah makanannya kerana giginya sakit.

examples.semai: "Jok hiet nyampong tengah kibubet," ajok kiurok nu amek de ubai ha-et nu selai sekejap sementare menang sanget jik kibukbet.
examples.en: "Let's go, fortunately she is sleeping," the grandmother told the mother that they both wanted to go to the garden for a while, while our little sister was sleeping.
examples.ms: "Jom kita pergi mujur dia sedang tidur," nenek berkata kepada ibu yang mereka berdua mahu pergi ke kebun sekejap sementara adik kecil kami sedang tidur.

examples.semai: Wak Wawa kigemar neng cerite nyanik hamapen ilei ajeh penakot.
examples.en: Wak Wawa likes to watch ghost movies even though she is a coward.
examples.ms: Wak Wawa suka menonton cerita hantu walaupun dia adalah seorang yang penakut.

senses.definition_ms: kasihannya; kata untuk menyatakan perasaan kasihan

examples.semai: Nyanyak, nen cok ajeh kicuag.
examples.en: Poor thing, that dog is hungry.
examples.ms: Kesiannya anjing itu lapar.

examples.semai: "Bor suara Wahk Dia bile kibenyanyi," Cekgu Kamil kipateh.
examples.en: "Wak Dia's voice is good when she sings," Mr. Kami said, praising her.
examples.ms: "Sedap suara Wak Dia bila dia menyanyi," Cikgu Kamil memuji.

examples.semai: Mai engrak manah naiurok, ku arik nyap adehleh mong jeoi nyanik naihol. Sebab ajehleh selalo naior jog madeg amen iarik nyap.
examples.en: The elders said that when the sky was red at dusk many ghosts roamed around. That is why they always told us to go home when twilight came.
examples.ms: Orang tua-tua dahulu berkata bahawa pada waktu senja merah terdapat banyak hantu-hantu berkeliaran. Oleh sebab itulah mereka selalu menyuruh kita pulang ke rumah pada waktu terjadi senja merah.

examples.semai: "Amen hiha-et nu englag hik kena hinyeberang teu entoi ajeh canuk," Bah Long kiternyol ha Sg. Perak nu jik.
examples.en: "If we want to go to the other side, we must cross the big river first," said Bah Long pointing to the Perak river to us.
examples.ms: "Jika kita nak pergi ke sebelah, kita hendaklah menyeberang sungai besar itu dulu," Bah Long menuding ke Sg. Perak kepada kami.

examples.semai: Bah Jali pek lalu kiangkat kerusi batu ajeh kihalei, jadi kiajak ikekawat kaha-jeg kerusi nyeh ajeh nu laman deg.
examples.en: Bah Jali could not lift the stone chair alone, so he invited his friends to move that heavy chair to the yard.
examples.ms: Bah Jali tidak mampu mengangkat kerusi batu tersebut seorang diri, jadi dia mengajak rakan-rakannya memindahkan kerusi yang berat itu ke halaman rumah.

senses.definition_en: to tease; to joke; to kid

examples.semai: Bha Duyen kinyeh ha bha Saki.
examples.en: Bah Duyen teased Bah Saki.
examples.ms: Bah Duyen mengejek terhadap Bah Saki.

examples.semai: "Eng ngnyek pek ngha-cakcak," Bah Meran kipasal nu iamek.
examples.en: "I do not want to eat," Bah Meran told his mother.
examples.ms: "Saya tidak mahu makan," Bah Meran memberitahu kepada ibunya.

examples.semai: "Kuceg jik ya nyep, entah nu belok kijar," Wak Lila kipasal nu jik.
examples.en: "Our cat has disappeared, we don't know where it went," Wak Lila asked us.
examples.ms: "Kucing kami telah hilang, entah ke mana dia lari," Wak Lila memberitahu kepada kami.

examples.semai: "Gelpal eng nyik kenak nyijak," Bah Jali kipasal nu ikenah.
examples.en: "My shoulder hurts because I hit the wall bracket," Bah Jali told his wife.
examples.ms: "Bahu saya sakit terkena penyangga dinding," Bah Jali memberitahu isterinya.

examples.semai: Jog Bah Halil nyik kitejebat paku.
examples.en: Bah Hall's foot hurt because he had accidentally stepped on a nail.
examples.ms: Kaki Bah Halil sakit terpijak paku.

examples.semai: Nyok ku belakang deg ajok Sila ya cerek medei bok hentok ha misen.
examples.en: The japanese bloodgrass that is behind grandma Sila house is long because no one is cutting it.
examples.ms: Lalang merah di belakang nenek Sila sudah panjang kerana tiada siapa yang memotongnya.

examples.semai: Bah Sali kinyok bakau.
examples.en: Bah Sali smokes tobacco.
examples.ms: Bah Sali menghisap tembakau.

senses.definition_en: to take; to get; to carry

examples.semai: Pegelap jinek amek eng kinyong teu ku perigi.
examples.en: My mother took water from the well this morning.
examples.ms: Pagi tadi, emak saya mengambil air di perigi.

examples.semai: Wak Ramlah kinyui ikenon sanget.
examples.en: Wak Ramlah kissed his little son.
examples.ms: Wak Ramlah mencium anaknya yang kecil.

examples.semai: Bah Sali kinyuk bakau.
examples.en: Bah Sali smokes tobacco.
examples.ms: Bah Sali menghisap tembakau.

examples.semai: Mong deg og ajeh ku kemil keneng sempak.
examples.en: There is a ground wasp's nest in the durian tree.
examples.ms: Terdapat sarang tebuan tanah di atas pokok durian.

examples.semai: "Baju ajeh biog ya Bah Nan ha hek," Wak Jari kiurok nu Wak Mila.
examples.en: "The shirt was given by Bah Nan for you," Wak Jari said to Wak Mila.
examples.ms: "Baju tersebut diberi oleh Bah Nan bagi kamu," Wak Jari berkata kepada Wak Mila.

senses.definition_en: word to express that one does not know, perhaps, maybe

examples.semai: "Oh," Bah Gurek kiberlag bile bitanya belok imemenang ya iamek.
examples.en: "I don't know," Bah Gurek replied when his mother asked where his siblings had gone.
examples.ms: "Entah," Bah Gurek menjawab bila ibunya bertanya ke mana adik-adiknya pergi.

senses.definition_en: to be awake but not willing to get up; to be lazy to get up

examples.semai: Iarik la yah tapi lekakt kiop.
examples.en: It's already daytime but he's too lazy to get up.
examples.ms: Hari sudah siang tetapi dia buat-buat tidur.

examples.semai: Bah Hussin kior ianak buah kot bantal.
examples.en: Bah Husin ordered his nephew to take a pillow.
examples.ms: Bah Husin menyuruh anak buahnya mengambil bantal.

examples.semai: Bah Midin kirup os ku deg pender mandei kaha-jop gale.
examples.en: Bah Midin lit a fire in the hut because he wanted to roast the tapioca.
examples.ms: Bah Midin menyala api di dalam pondok kerana mahu membakar ubi kayu.

senses.definition_ms: di; untuk menunjukkan arah atau tempat

examples.semai: Sempak Bah Jani ku pabel.
examples.en: Bah Jani's durian trees are in the scrub.
examples.ms: Pokok-pokok durian Bah Jani terdapat di belukar.

senses.definition_ms: memacak; menusuk atau membenam benda tajam ke atas sesuatu (tanah dan sebagainya)

examples.semai: Bah Kamil kipacak ichenol deg ku belakang deg iamek.
examples.en: Bah Kamil staked his house pole behind his mother's house.
examples.ms: Bah Kamil memacak tiang rumahnya di belakang rumah ibunya.

senses.definition_en: to puncture; to open something by making a puncture
senses.definition_ms: menebuk; membuka atau membelah sesuatu (tin, buluh dll.) dengan menggunakan benda yang tajam

examples.semai: Wak Nani kipacok tong susu ajeh medei kaha-beh teh ha iapak.
examples.en: Wak Nani punctured the condensed milk can because she wanted to make tea for his father.
examples.ms: Wak Nani menebuk tin susu kerana mahu membuat teh bagi bapanya.

senses.definition_ms: gelaran bagi landak; sejenis landak kecil

examples.semai: Hajap hunen hiha bakek pacor mong pen ku Zoo taleh.
examples.en: Now it is difficult to see a procupine in the wild, if we do, it will only be at the Zoo.
examples.ms: Sekarang susah nak berjumpa dengan landak, kalau ada pun di Zoo sahaja.

examples.semai: Mai sanget sekulah naimain bula ku padag.
examples.en: School children play football on the field.
examples.ms: Budak-budak sekolah bermain bola sepak di padang.

examples.semai: Padehal Wak Maria kicerengai ikekenon naibekelahi ku kateh bilek liknai, tapi saja kibeh pek panei.
examples.en: Actually Wak Maria heard her children fighting in their room, but she pretended that she didn't know about it.
examples.ms: Sebenarnya Wak Maria mendengar anak-anakknya berkelahi di dalam bilik mereka, tetapi dia sengaja membuat tidak tahu.

senses.definition_ms: pusat; lekuk di tengah perut; tempat di mana tali perut bersambung ke uri

examples.semai: Jerek padek Bah Sita ajeh.
examples.en: Bah Sita's navel is deep.
examples.ms: Pusat Bah Sita adalah dalam.

senses.definition_ms: fail; bekas atau tempat (selalunya diperbuat daripada kertas tebal atau plastik) untuk menyimpan sesuatu dokumen yang penting. Cth: surat, sijil kelahiran dll.

examples.semai: Wak Sila kidek dikdij isijel de penteng ku kateh pael dea pek nyep.
examples.en: Wak Sila keeps all of her important certificates in a file so that they do not go missing.
examples.ms: Wak Sila menyimpan semua sijilnya yang penting di dalam fail supaya tidak hilang.

examples.semai: Bah Selan kitulog itenek terbor paet de ceeh medei tesilap bilanggar ya luri sawet.
examples.en: Bah Selan helped his brother repair the pipe that was broken because it had been accidentally  hit by a palm oil truck.
examples.ms: Bah Selan menolong abangnya memperbaiki paip yang pecah akibat tersilap dilanggar oleh lori sawit.

senses.definition_ms: pagar; sesuatu kayu, batu atau besi dawai yang dibuat bagi mendindingi sesuatu kawasan (rumah, tanah,kubur dsbnya) supaya tidak dimasuki atau dicerobohi oleh sesuatu

examples.semai: Bah Cicak kibeh pagar ku idepan deg medei kinyek ilaman deg bimuj ya cok.
examples.en: Bah Cicak made a fence in front of his house because he did not want dogs to come into his yard.
examples.ms: Bah Cicak membuat pagar di depan rumahnya kerana tidak mahu halaman rumahnya dimasuki oleh anjing.

senses.definition_ms: baru; belum ada sebelumnya dari yang ada sekarang; belum lama

examples.semai: Bah Tam kibeli deg pai, tapi pek lei lima gencek naigei ya mong jeoi inerusak.
examples.en: Bah Tam bought a new house, but in less than five months occupying the house, there was a lot of damage.
examples.ms: Bah Tam membeli rumah baharu, tetapi tidak sampai sehingga lima bulan mereka meduduki rumah tersebut, telah terdapat banyak kerosakannya.

senses.definition_en: to calculate everything; to be too calculating

examples.semai: "Wak Sali ajeh kigemar bepajeh ha hik, tapi cuba hik nu ilei pek pernah hibual ma-ma pen," Wak Maria kiurok nu ikekawat.
examples.en: "Wak Sali likes to calculate everything that she has spent for us, but if the other way around, we never say a word," Wak Maria told her friends.
examples.ms: "Wak Sali suka berkira dengan kita, tapi jika kita dengan dirinya, kita tidak pernah berkata apa-apa pun," Wak Maria berkata kepada rakan-rakannya.

examples.semai: Isi dij bob ajeh kateh pak.
examples.en: Put all the books in the box.
examples.ms: Isi semua buku itu ke dalam kotak.

examples.semai: Bah Long kipakat iamek et nu kedei.
examples.en: Bah Long invited his mother to go to the store.
examples.ms: Bah Long mengajak ibunya untuk pergi ke kedai.

senses.definition_ms: pakai; mengenakan sesuatu pada tubuh badan

examples.semai: Wak Ati kigemar bepakei baju kurong nu tempat kerjak.
examples.en: Wak Ati likes to wear a traditional style of dress to work.
examples.ms: Wak Ati suka memakai baju kurung ke tempat kerja.

examples.semai: "Paknyak Wak Sita ya manah kikerakjak ku Kuala Lumpur," Wak Mira kipasal nu Wak Lani mase ubai besimbang.
examples.en: "Apparently Wak Sita has been working in Kuala Lumpur for a long time," Wak Mira told Wak Lani while they were chatting.
examples.ms: "Rupa-rupanya Wak Sita sudah lama bekerja di Kuala Lumpur," Wak Mira memberitahu Wak Lani semasa mereka berdua bersembang.

examples.semai: Wak Mila kipakse ikekenon naimamuh, amen tok, ikekenon ajeh naibukbet kelem langsong pek naimamuh canuk.
examples.en: Wak Mila forces her children to take a shower, otherwise the children would sleep at night without taking a shower first.
examples.ms: Wak Mila memaksa anak-anaknya untuk mandi, jika tidak, anak-anaknya tersebut akan tidur malam tanpa mandi terlebih dahuu.

examples.semai: Bah Jali kibeli paku kaha-pahat ris.
examples.en: Bah Jali bought the nails to nail down the floor of the house.
examples.ms: Bah Jali membeli paku bagi memaku lantai rumah.

examples.semai: Wak Samnah kipal roi de naiha-dep ha caknak.
examples.en: Wak Samnah swatted the flies which were about to land on the food.
examples.ms: Wak Samnah memukul lalat yang mahu menghinggapi makanan.

examples.semai: Mabek sanget naimamuh palak ku pateu.
examples.en: Children bath naked in the river.
examples.ms: Kanak-kanak bermandi telanjang di sungai.

senses.definition_ms: bayas; sejenis tumbuhan palma yang tumbuh liar di dalam hutan, isi batang tumbuhan ini boleh dijadikan makanan.

examples.semai: Apak kikoh keneng palei, kaha-berkep iisi ha menasak.
examples.en: The father cut the trunk of the bayas tree, to get the shoot to be cooked.
examples.ms: Bapa memotong batang pokok bayas, bagi mendapatkan umbutnya untuk dimasak.

senses.definition_en: the most; extremely; used with an adjective to make a superlative

examples.semai: "Baru adehleh kimanik de paleng lebat telas memerip gencek ya pek kimanik begei adeh. Selame anoh, mong kimanik pen had sekejap-sekajap taleh," Bah Kali kibesimbang ru Bah Nua mase ubai pimpoj manik kihoj ku tempat piknoj bas.
examples.en: "This time is the heaviest it has rained after several months of rain unlike it. So far, it has only rained intermittently," Bah Kali chatted with Bah Nua as they both waited for the rain to subside at the bus stop.
examples.ms: "Baru kali inilah hujan yang paling lebat setelah berberapa bulan tidak hujan sebegini. Selama ini, hujan hanya turun dengan sekejap-sekejap sahaja," Bah Kali bersembang dengan Bah Nua semasa mereka berdua menunggu hujan reda di tempat perhentian bas.

examples.semai: Bah Wan kipalet paya ku teg iamek.
examples.en: Bah Wan smeared mud on his mother's hand.
examples.ms: Bah Wan memalit paya di tangan ibunya.

examples.semai: "Paloh ajeh ya kutor wes agok muh," ajok kiurok nu icecenok.
examples.en: "The pool is dirty, do not bathe there," grandmother said to her grandchildren.
examples.ms: "Kolam itu sudah kotor, jangan mandi di situ," nenek berkata kepada cucu-cucunya.

examples.semai: "Pak ajeh ya palok, tutop nok ya hek," Wak Maznah kipasal nu Wak Nira.
examples.en: "The box is open, please close it," Wak Maznah told Wak Nira.
examples.ms: "Kotak tersebut sudah terbuka, tolong tutup," Wak Maznah memberitahu kepada Wak Nira.

senses.definition_ms: cebisan kayu api; kayu api yang dipotong dari batangnya

examples.semai: Bah Jan kikot palok kaha-jop kak.
examples.en: Bah Jan collected pieces of firewood to grill the fish.
examples.ms: Bah Jan mengambil cebisan kayu api bagi memanggang ikan.

senses.definition_ms: pam; sejenis alat yang digunakan untuk mengeluarkan atau menyedut udara, air dsbnya.

examples.semai: Bah Mali kiet nu stisen minyak medei kaha-pam itaya kerite, tapi pam ku stisen minyak ajeh ya rusak.
examples.en: Bah Mali went to the petrol station to inflate the tyres of his car, but the pump at the petrol station was broken.
examples.ms: Bah Mali pergi ke stesen minyak kerana mahu mengepam tayar keretanya, tetapi pam di stesen minyak tersebut telah rosak.

examples.semai: Bah Rani kipam itaya meskar medei ya kurang ipoi.
examples.en: Bah Rani pumped his bicycle tyres due to lack of air pressure.
examples.ms: Bah Rani mengepam tayar basikalnya kerana sudah kekurangan angin.

examples.semai: "Singah ku pamasi doh, ngha-kot penadol," Wak Mira kipasal nu igensir.
examples.en: "Later, stop at the pharmacy, I want to buy panadol," Wak Mira told her husband.
examples.ms: "Nanti singgah di farmasi, saya mahu membeli panadol," Wak Mira memberitahu kepada suaminya.

examples.semai: Wak Nani kineng itaya mutu ya pamcat mase kaha-et kerjak pegelap ajeh.
examples.en: Wak Nani saw that one of her motorcycle tires was punctured when she was about to go to work that morning.
examples.ms: Wak Nani melihat tayar motosikalmnya telah pancit semasa dia hendak pergi ke tempat kerja pagi tersebut.

senses.definition_en: for emphasis on the action of a verb
senses.definition_ms: untuk penekanan pada tindakan kata kerja

examples.semai: Wak Mila kipan jar mase biwag ya chok, mase kijog ju sekulah.
examples.en: Wak Mila ran hard while being chased by a dog on her way home from school.
examples.ms: Wak Mila berlari bersungguh-sungguh semasa dikejar oleh anjing ketika pulang dari sekolah.

examples.semai: Wak Nai kipan jap mase ku danan iamek jop.
examples.en: Wak Nai cried out loud at the time of her grandmother's death.
examples.ms: Wak Nai menangis sekuat-kuatnya semasa kematian neneknya.

examples.semai: "Agok pan ngut teh ajeh, medei tik beket," Wak Salma kipasal nu ikenon.
examples.en: "Don't drink the tea too fast, because it is still hot," Wak Salma told her son.
examples.ms: "Jangan minum teh itu dengan tergesa-gesa kerana ianya masih lagi panas," Wak Salma memberitahu kepada anaknya.

examples.semai: Bah Rani pek kisedar ilei kipan besimbang medei ha kiteruja kaha-pasal ikeputusan periksa de cemerlang ajeh nu iamek-apak.
examples.en: Bah Rani did not realize he was speaking very loud as he was excited to tell his parents the excellent results of his examination.
examples.ms: Bah Rani tidak menyedari dirinya bersembang dengan sangat kuat kerana dia teruja untuk memberitahu keputusan perperiksaannya yang cemerlang itu kepada ibu-bapanya.

senses.definition_en: to catch fish using a spear

examples.semai: Bah Nua ru ikekawat naiet naipanah kak ku teu batag arik.
examples.en: Bah Nua and his friends went spearfishing in the big river.
examples.ms: Bah Nua dan rakan-rakannya pergi memanah ikan di sungai besar.

examples.semai: Bah Loli mong jeoi panau ku icelod.
examples.en: On Bah Loli's back there are a lot of yeast infection spots.
examples.ms: Di belakang badan Bah Loli terdapat banyak panau.

senses.definition_ms: tawar; payau; makanan atau minuman yang tidak mempunyai rasa

examples.semai: "Gulei sej ajeh pancik, eng pek lalu ngcak," Wak Manja kiurok.
examples.en: "The meat dish is flavourless, I can't eat it," said Wak Manja.
examples.ms: "Gulai daging itu tawar, saya tidak larat memakannya," Wak Manja berkata.

senses.definition_en: spout; device used for channeling latex from the tap into the container
senses.definition_ms: pancur; alat yang digunakan untuk menyalurkan susu getah yang telah ditoreh masuk ke dalam bekasnya

examples.semai: Bah As kipasag pancor ku keneng ceber.
examples.en: Bah As installed a spout on a rubber tree (to channel the latex).
examples.ms: Bah As memasang pancur di pokok getah.

senses.definition_en: pandan, a generic name given to the smaller screw-pines
senses.definition_ms: pandan; sejenis tumbuhan yang mempunyai daun yang panjang dan berbentuk tirus serta berbau wangi; tumbuhan yang sering digunakan campuran bagi pembuatan sesetengah jenis kuih-muih atau untuk dicampur dalam nasi yang sedang dimasak

examples.semai: Wangi ngoi canak amen hibercet ru selak pandan.
examples.en: Rice smells fragrant when cooked with pandan leaves.
examples.ms: Nasi berbau wangi jika dimasak dengan daun pandan.

examples.semai: "Pandu ya hek, tah merek irasa gulei eng adeh nek," Wak Ria kior nu igensir.
examples.en: "Try it, see how my cooking tastes," Wak Ria told her husband.
examples.ms: "Kamu cuba, entah bagaimana rasanya gulai saya ini," Wak Ria menyuruh suaminya.

examples.semai: Hamapen ilei pai nik tahut iumur, tapi Wak Nia ajeh ya panei bebaca.
examples.en: Although she is only three years old, Wak Nia is already good at reading.
examples.ms: Walaupun umurnya baharu tiga tahun, tetapi Wak Nia sudah pandai membaca.

examples.semai: "Eng ngpanei hek tengah hasedeh, tapi agokle joi perasaan hek anen sangat," Wak Yana kinasihat ha Wak Ria.
examples.en: "I know you are sad, but do not depend on your feelings too much," Wak Yana advised Wak Ria.
examples.ms: "Saya tahu kamu sedang bersedih, tapi janganlah kamu ikut perasaan kamu sangat," Wak Yana menasihat Wak Ria.

senses.definition_ms: situ; di situ; kata yang menunjukkan tempat yang tidak berapa jauh

examples.semai: "Cinek eng ngdek bob hek ku panen, tapi adeh tah ku belok pek ngpanei," Wak Sila kipasal nu Bah Jali.
examples.en: "Earlier I put your book there, but now I do not know where it went," Wak Sila told Bah Jali.
examples.ms: "Tadi saya meletakkan buku kamu di situ, tetapi sekarang ianya entah ke mana, saya tidak tahu," Wak Sila memberitahu kepada Bah Jali.

examples.semai: Bah Din kipangag kak ha caknak tengah arik adeh.
examples.en: Bah Din grilled fish for lunch today.
examples.ms: Bah Din memanggang ikan untuk makan tengah hari ini.

examples.semai: Bah Deli kior ikenah panggak caknak ha tengloh de hol nu deg enai.
examples.en: Bah Deli told his wife to serve food to the guests who came to their house.
examples.ms: Bah Deli menyuruh isterinya menghidangkan makanan bagi tetamu yang hadir ke rumah  mereka.

examples.semai: Semandang kipanggak abat de kijual ajeh ku ngar deg Bah Sali.
examples.en: The vendor always piles up the clothes he sells in front of Bah Sali's house.
examples.ms: Penjual itu selalu melonggokkan pakaian yang dijualnya itu di hadapan rumah Bah Sali.

examples.semai: Bah Nami kibeh pangken ku idepan deg.
examples.en: Bah Nami made a wooden rack in front of his house.
examples.ms: Bah Nami membuat pangkin di depan rumahnya.

examples.semai: Bah Man ya kirancang kaha-en ikekenon-kenah bekelah nu pantei ku hujong gecek adeh.
examples.en: Bah Man is already planning to take his family for a picnic at the beach later this month.
examples.ms: Bah Man sudah merancang untuk membawa keluarganya pergi berkelah di pantai pada hujung bulan ini.

examples.semai: Mong jooi pantem ku belakang deg Wah Su.
examples.en: There are many monkeys at the back of Wah Su's house.
examples.ms: Ada banyak monyet di belakang rumah Wah Su.

senses.definition_en: cut, scratched or pierced (by sharp and straight objects)
senses.definition_ms: tercacak (oleh benda tajam dan lurus); tersusuk oleh benda yang lurus dan tajam

examples.semai: Jog Bah Aris ajeh panting ya yoj.
examples.en: Bah Aris' leg was cut with a knife.
examples.ms: Kaki Bah Aris itu tercacak dengan pisau.

senses.definition_en: a Malay poetic form that consists of a pair of rhyming couplets
senses.definition_ms: pantun; sejenis puisi berangkap yang mempunyai persamaan bunyi dihujung pembayang dan maksudnya

examples.semai: "Mase ilei lekat sui, enjop eng manahjeh kigemar bepantut," Bah Ramli kipasal nu ikenah.
examples.en: "While she was still alive, my grandmother used to love Malay poetry," Bah Ramli told his wife.
examples.ms: "Semasa dia masih hidup, nenek saya dahulu suka berpantun," Bah Ramli memberitahu kepada isterinya.

senses.definition_en: to warm up body by the fire
senses.definition_ms: memanaskan badan; berdiang; memanaskan badan di depan atau berdekatan dengan unggun api

examples.semai: "Enjop eng tiap pegelap kipap os," Wak Tila kipasal nu igensir.
examples.en: "Every morning my grandmother warms herself in front of the fire," Wak Tila told her husband.
examples.ms: "Pada setiap pagi nenek saya memanaskan badan di depan unggun api." Wak Tila memberitahu kepada suaminya.

examples.semai: Bah Tuni kilog ibaju papah.
examples.en: Bah Tuni wore his shirt inside out.
examples.ms: Bah Tuni memakai bajunya secara terbalik.

examples.semai: Kuceg Wak Nira kidak papah betol-betol ku depan pintu deg enai.
examples.en: Wak Nira's cat was lying across the doorstep of their house.
examples.ms: Kucing milik Wak Nira baring terlentang betul-betul di depan pintu rumah mereka.

examples.semai: Papan hitam ya susah hiha-bakek ku belok-belok pen sejak dikdij mai naiguna had papan puteh taleh.
examples.en: Blackboards are hard to find anywhere since everyone uses only whiteboards.
examples.ms: Papan hitam sukar untuk dijumpai di mana-mana pun sahaja semenjak semua orang hanya menggunakan papan putih sahaja.

examples.semai: Bah Sani kibeh deg papat ku ienglag deg ha iamek medei iamek kinyek gigei ku deg simen.
examples.en: Bah Sani constructed a house of wooden planks next to his own for his mother because his mother did not want to live in a cement house.
examples.ms: Bah Sani membuat rumah papan di sebelah rumahnya bagi ibunya kerana ibunya tidak mahu tinggal di rumah simen.

examples.semai: Betes ajeh ya mai papeh.
examples.en: The mushrooms are already growing.
examples.ms: Cendawan itu sudah bertumbuh.

examples.semai: Jehuk ajeh papot ya pes dui.
examples.en: The tree was split by the storm yesterday.
examples.ms: Pokok itu terbelah oleh ribut semalam

senses.definition_ms: para; tempat menyimpan barang-barang yang dibuat tinggi separas bahu atau kepala dan sebaliknya mengikut keperluan

examples.semai: Bah Wan kibeh para ku ibilek, tempat kaha-dek iarap.
examples.en: Bah Wan put up shelves in his room, for a place to put his belongings.
examples.ms: Bah Wan membuat para di biliknya, iaitu tempat bagi meletakkan barang-barangnyanya.

examples.semai: Mambek sanget naigemar bekutep mat para, naiha-beh mat ha man congkak.
examples.en: The children like to collect rubber seeds to be used as the chips for congkak (a Malay game).
examples.ms: Kanak-kanak suka mengutip biji getah bagi dijadikan biji-biji bagi permainan congkak.

senses.definition_ms: garau; parau; kasar dan besar bunyinya

examples.semai: Suara Wak Manik ajeh parau medei nyik irungkog ya sih.
examples.en: Wak Manik's voice became hoarse and her throat hurt due to having a cold.
examples.ms: Suara Wak Manik menjadi garau kerana kerongkongnya sakit akibat dari selsema.

examples.semai: Kak pari ajeh kak de bebisa isentak.
examples.en: Stingrays are fish that have poisonous tails.
examples.ms: Ikan pari adalah ikan yang mempunyai ekor yang berbisa.

examples.semai: Bah Kana ya nik gecek kigei ku wad hospitel medei iparu-paru ya rusak. Dokte kipasal, ipunca medei ilei kuat kinyuk rukok.
examples.en: Bah Kana has already been in the ward at the hospital for three months, because his lungs are damaged. The doctor has advised that the reason is because he is a heavy smoker.
examples.ms: Sudah tiga bulan Bah Kana tinggal di wad, di hospital kerana paru-parunya telah rosak. Doktor memaklumkan bahwa puncanya adalah kerana beliau kuat merokok.

examples.semai: "Pegelap huper jok haret nu pasa, harkot lauk," Wak Ramlah kiurok nu igensir.
examples.en: "Tomorrow morning, let's go to the market to buy side dishes Ramlah said to her husband.
examples.ms: "Esok pagi, mari kita ke pasar bagi membeli lauk-pauk," Wak Ramlah berkata kepada suaminya.

senses.definition_en: to install; to affix; to fasten; to turn on

examples.semai: Bah Wan kitulog iapak pasag lampu ku belakang deg.
examples.en: Bah Wan helped his father install lights in the backyard.
examples.ms: Bah Wan menolong bapanya memasang lampu di belakang rumah.

senses.definition_ms: pasak; tetap; tinggal di satu tempat sahaja

examples.semai: "Sebenarnye, jik mai luar tapi ya jipasak ku kampug adeh ya liu, sejak jaman kemoj dot jik lagi," Bah Mali kipasal nu Bah Nan mase ubai besimbang.
examples.en: "Actually, we are outsiders but we have been permanently settled in this village for a long time, since the time of our great grandfather," Bah Mali told Bah Nan while they were chatting.
examples.ms: "Sebenarnya, kami merupakan orang luar tetapi sudah pasak di kampung ini sudah lama, sejak zaman mendiang moyang kami lagi," Bah Mali memberitahu kepada Bah Nan semasa mereka bersembang.

senses.definition_en: to converse; to talk; to inform

examples.semai: "Amen haet ku kedei, pasal nu eng. En ngha-joi," Wak Sali kiurok nu itenek.
examples.en: "If you want to go to the store, please inform me. I want to go with you," Wak Sali said to her older brother.
examples.ms: "Jika kamu mahu ke kedai, beritahu kepada saya. Saya mahu ikut," Wak Sali berkata kepada abangnya.

senses.definition_en: passover; easter; one of the religious celebration by the Jewish and Christian
senses.definition_ms: paskah; salah satu perayaan keagamaan bagi agama Yahudi dan Kristian

examples.semai: "Ku senamut raya Paskah doh, jik mong jibeh caknak ku padeg. Amen engkesenang, beile hol cakcak," Wak Ani kipasal nu ikekawat.
examples.en: "At the coming Easter celebration, we will have a feast at home. If you have time, please come and join us," Wak Ani told her friends.
examples.ms: "Pada sambutan perayaan Paskah nanti, kami mengadakan jamuan di rumah. Jika kalian mempunyai kelapangan, datanglah untuk makan," Wak Ani memberitahu kepada kawan-kawannya.

examples.semai: "Mongka haen paspot? Agok sip, sengoh doh entah mong pules," Bah Miran kipasal nu ikenah mase ubaiha-hol ubaiha-et nu pekan.
examples.en: "Did you bring an identity card? Don't forget, because there may be a police check," Bah Miran told his wife as they wanted to go out to town.
examples.ms: "Kamu ada membawa kad pengenalan? Jangan lupa, kerana nanti mungkin terdapat polis," Bah Miran memberitahu kepada isterinya semasa mereka mahu keluar untuk ke pekan.

senses.definition_en: to break something to open or to pull oout
senses.definition_ms: mengumpil; mengopak; menanggalkan atau membuka sesuatu supaya tercabut dan terbuka

examples.semai: Bah Wan kipat pintu tandas medei hajap biha-buka.
examples.en: Bah Wan was forced to break the toilet door because it was too difficult to open it.
examples.ms: Bah Wan mengopak pintu tandas kerana susah hendak dibuka.

examples.semai: "Amek eng selalo kipateh icecenok medei rajet naitulog bahbeh kerjak deg," Wak Nita kipasal nu igensir.
examples.en: "My mother always praises her grandchildren because they are diligent in helping with housework," Wak Nita told her husband.
examples.ms: "Ibu saya selalu memuji cucu-cucunya kerana mereka rajin menolong melakukan kerja-kerja rumah," Wak Nita memberitahu suaminya.

examples.semai: Bah Nua pek kicak kak paten medei kak ajeh ingoi hanyir.
examples.en: Bah Nua did not eat the catfish because of the fetid smell.
examples.ms: Bah Nua tidak memakan ikan patin kerana bau ikan tersebut hanyir.

examples.semai: Wak Bilung lekat kisuj iabat ku pateu hamapen hunen ya mong teu pili.
examples.en: Wak Bilung is still washing her clothes in the river even though there is now tap water.
examples.ms: Wak Bilung masih mencuci pakaiannya di sungai walaupun sekarang sudah terdapat air paip.

examples.semai: "Agok hiran, keneng legos adeh mimang patik medei ha bikawen," Bah Selah kipasal nu ikekawat mase naihol saje naicekcip nu ikebon.
examples.en: "Do not be surprised, this rambutan tree is indeed short because it is grafted," Bah Selah told his friends when they visited his garden.
examples.ms: "Jangan hairan, pokok rambutan ini memang pendek kerana ianya rambutan kawin," Bah Selah memberitahu rakan-rakannya semasa mereka ke berjalan-jalan ke kebunnya.

examples.semai: Hamapan Bah Jali ajeh itenek ru Bah Mami ajeh imenang, tapi Bah Jali lebeh patik ju Bah Mami.
examples.en: Although Bah Jali is the older brother of Bah Mami, nevertheless Bah Jali is shorter to Bah Mami.
examples.ms: Walaupun Bah Jali adalah abang kepada Bah Mami, tetapi Bah Jali lebih rendah dari Bah Mami.

examples.semai: Wak Mira kidek ku patik engleg pingat de kikutep medei pek lalu kaha-angkot.
examples.en: Wak Mira put down on the ground some of the plates that she had picked up because she didn't have the strength to carry them all.
examples.ms: Wak Mira meletakkan di atas tanah sebahagian dari pinggan yang dia kutip kerana dia tidak mampu membawanya.

examples.semai: Bah Gilan kipatoh, tok pek kidegel engrok iapak de kior akiperdij ibelajar ku universiti canuk sebelom kibekenah.
examples.en: Bah Gilan compiled and did not oppose his father who asked him to finish his studies at university first before getting married.
examples.ms: Bah Gilan mematuhi dan tidak membantah bapanya yang menyuruh dia menghabiskan pengajian di universiti terlebih dahulu sebelum mendirikan rumah tangga.

examples.semai: Wak Mira mong jeoi iman patong de kikumpol sejak isanget lagi.
examples.en: Wak Mira has many dolls that she has collected since childhood.
examples.ms: Wak Mira mempunyai banyak patung mainan yang beliau kumpul sejak dari kanak-kanak lagi.

examples.semai: Hamapen hik pek sependapat ru enai, tapi pek patot kibekasar nu mai engrak, baik ku bangwal atao ku bahneh hik.
examples.en: Although we do not agree with them, we should not be rude to the elders, either in words or in deeds.
examples.ms: Walaupun kita tidak bersependapat dengan mereka, tetapi kita tidak wajar untuk berkasar dengan orang tua, sama ada dengan kata-kata mahupun dengan perbuatan.

examples.semai: Wak Nani kigemar cak kak patug, jadi selalo kiajak igensir tengroj medei kaha-berkep kak ajeh.
examples.en: Wak Nani likes to eat malayan leaffish, so she always ask her husband to fish with her to get that fish.
examples.ms: Wak Nani suka memakan ikan patung, jadi dia selalu mengajak suaminya memancing bagi mendapatkan ikan tersebut.

senses.definition_en: bao; a type of yeast-leavened filled bun

examples.semai: Wak Sara ihad kaha-belajar bahbeh koi pau medei igensir ru ikekenon naigemar cakcak koi ajeh.
examples.en: Wak Sara really wants to learn how to make bao bun because her husband and children like to eat it.
examples.ms: Wak Sara sangat ingin mempelajari cara membuat kuih pau kerana suami dan anak-anaknya suka memakan kuih tersebut.

examples.semai: Bah Suan kisuj imutu telas kijog ju itengroj medei tebeg ya payak.
examples.en: Bah Suan washed his motorcycle after returning from fishing because there was a lot of mud on it.
examples.ms: Bah Suan mencuci motosikalnya setelah pulang dari memancing kerana pada motosikalnya itu terdapat banyak lumpur.

examples.semai: "Iarik kaha-manik, bor hien payong siap-siap," Wan Ani kiurok nu Wak Nani.
examples.en: "It's about to rain, we had better get ready and bring an umbrella," Wak Ani said to Wak Nani.
examples.ms: "Hari mahu hujan, lebih baik kita siap-siap membawa payung," Wak Ani berkata kepada Wak Nani.

examples.semai: Kipe kuhu-mamuh, tapi tok kimamuh pen lagi.
examples.en: He said (earlier) that he wanted to take a shower, but still has not done it!
examples.ms: Dia berkata (tadi) dia mahu mandi, tapi masih tak lagi mandi.

examples.semai: Bah Man mong kidek peas ku ideg mahnuh. Mase pai kikep entem, ipeas ajeh had mar tapar teg taleh. Hunen iteninoi ya mar lik entoi.
examples.en: Bah Man is raising a shoftshell turtle (which is kept) in the bathroom. At the time he got it, it was only the size of a human palm. Now, it is the size of a large frying pan.
examples.ms: Bah Man ada membela labi-labi (yang disimpan) di bilik mandi. Masa dia baharu mendapatnya, saiznya cuma sebesar tapak tangan sahaja. Sekarang, saiznya sudah sebesar kuali yang besar.

senses.definition_en: to control oneself, to practice self-control

examples.semai: Pek liu nij, Bah Suki bipecare ku mahkamah ha ikes kilanggar mai engen mutu ku nong timbok gecek canuk jeh.
examples.en: Soon, Bah Suki will be tried in court for his case of hitting a motorcyclist on the road.
examples.ms: Tidak lama lagi, Bah Suki akan dibicarakan di mahkamah terhadap kesnya yang melanggar pembonceng motosikal di jalanraya.

examples.semai: "Mongka teu peceg? Eng ngha-ngut. Beket betol iarik, arik adeh!" Bah Lan kisemanj nu ikenah telas kijog ju iselai.
examples.en: "Is there any cold water? I want to drink. The weather is very hot today!" Bah Lan asked his wife after he returned from his farm.
examples.ms: "Ada air sejuk tak? Saya mahu minum. Cuaca sangat panas hari ini!" Bah Lan meminta kepada isterinya setelah dia pulang dari ladangnya.

examples.semai: Restoran Radzi naiog caknak pecume nu mai jengoi medei kedei ajeh pai bibuka ku arik ajeh.
examples.en: Radzi Restaurant provided free food to public in conjunction with the opening of the shop on that day.
examples.ms: Restoran Radzi memberikan makanan percuma kepada orang ramai sempena pembukaan kedai itu pada hari tersebut.

senses.definition_en: to play a prank; to do a joke or mischievous act
senses.definition_ms: mendajal; perbuatan nakal terhadap orang lain sama ada bertujuan untuk bergurau atau sememangnya berniat sedemikian

examples.semai: Bah Asim kigemar pedajal ha mai, pek kira sangetka engrak.
examples.en: Bah Asim likes to play pranks on people, regardless of whether they are children or the elderly.
examples.ms: Bah Asim suka mendajal orang, tidak mengira pada kanak-kanak atau pada orang tua.

examples.semai: "Pedas betol sambal kak mileh menasak hek adeh!" Wak Lila kiurok nu ikenon menaleh.
examples.en: "The anchovy sambal that you cooked is very spicy!" Wak Lila said to her daughter.
examples.ms: "Sangat pedas sambal ikan bilis yang kamu masak ini!" Wak Lila berkata kepada anak gadisnya.

examples.semai: "Tulog peder nu apak dea kinyong eng ku sekulah," Wak Lia kipasal nu iamek ku kateh talipon.
examples.en: "Please tell dad to meet me up at the school," Wak Lia told his mother via a phone call.
examples.ms: "Tolong beritahu kepada bapa supaya dia menjemput saya di sekolah," Wak Lia memberitahu ibunya menerusi panggilan telefon.

examples.semai: Bah Nan kipediam ilei hamapen bitanya bekali-kali ya iapak medei kipanei ilei ya kibeh salah.
examples.en: Bah Nan remained silent despite being repeatedly asked by his father because he knew he had done something wrong.
examples.ms: Bah Nan mendiam diri (sahaja) walaupun ditanya berkali-kali oleh bapanya kerana dia tahu dia telah berbuat salah.

examples.semai: Bah Atan pek kipeduli amen mong mai naihol nu imadeg medei kek mimang kigei kihalei.
examples.en: Bah Atan does not care whether anyone comes to his house or not, because he lives alone.
examples.ms: Bah Atan tidak mempeduli jika ada sesiapa yang datang ke rumahnya kerana dia memang tinggal bersendirian.

examples.semai: "Ngoi kak piya ajeh peeg hamapen ya bigureng. Pek lalu ngha-cak," engrok amek Wak Tia.
examples.en: "The smell of the talipia fish is fishy even though it has been fried. I can't eat it," said Wak Tia's mother.
examples.ms: "Bau ikan talipia itu hanyir walaupun ianya sudah digoreng. Tidak boleh saya memakannya," kata ibu kepada Wak Tia.

senses.definition_ms: bocor; mempunyai lohong, lubang tiris pada bahagian permukaan atau bahagian dalam

examples.semai: Bah Gani kitukar ipelog deg medei ilei de manah ya jeoi peg amen kimanik.
examples.en: Bah Gani changed the roof of his house because if it rained, there were many leaks.
examples.ms: Bah Gani menukar atap rumahnya kerana sekiranya hujan, terdapat banyak kebocoran pada atap yang lama.

examples.semai: "Peg sanget ajeh," amek eng kiurok nu eng ha menang jik mase jiha-lintas nong.
examples.en: "Lead that child by the hand," my mother said to me about my younger sister as we were about to cross the street.
examples.ms: "Pimpin (tangan) budak itu," ibu saya berkata kepada saya mengenai adik kami semasa kami mahu melintas jalan.

examples.semai: "Angkat baju ku cenglei, iarik ya kaha-peg!" Wak Nita kiurok nu ikenon.
examples.en: "Get the clothes on the washing line, it's about to rain!" Wak Nita said to her daughter.
examples.ms: "Angkat baju di ampaian, hari sudah mahu hujan!" Wak Nita berkata kepada anaknya.

examples.semai: "Og madeh engleg, eng ngtulog pegag arap hek," Wak Yan kiurok nu Wak Kina.
examples.en: "Give me some of your things, I can help you hold them," Wak Yan said to Wak Kina.
examples.ms: "Beri sebahagian barang-barang kamu, saya boleh tolong pegang," Wak Yan berkata kepada Wak Kina.

senses.definition_ms: pagi; menggambarkan keadaan pagi pada pukul 8 pagi sehingga 11 pagi, iaitu ketika matahari baru terbit.

examples.semai: Bor pegelap!
examples.en: Good morning!
examples.ms: Selamat pagi!

examples.semai: Cep peger adeh begei ha pog, tapi lagi lawa ikale.
examples.en: The pheasant looks like chicken, but its color is more beautiful.
examples.ms: Ayam pegar adalah seperti ayam, tetapi warnya lebih cantik.

senses.definition_en: to boil (as a way of cooking)
senses.definition_ms: merebus; memasak sesuatu menggunakan air panas dengan cara merendam atau membiarkan bahan-bahan tersebut di dalam air yang sedang panas

examples.semai: Wak Mali kipegoh kak puyu ru tarog ha caknak tengah arik enai.
examples.en: Wak Mali boiled the puyu fish with the tapioca shoots as their lunch.
examples.ms: Wak Mali merebus ikan puyu dengan pucuk ubi sebagai makanan tengah hari mereka.

senses.definition_ms: menjerang (air); memanaskan air di dalam cerek atau sesuatu bekas yang lain supaya masak

examples.semai: Bah Tam kipegoh teu kaha-beh teh.
examples.en: Bah Tam boils water to make tea.
examples.ms: Bah Tam menjerang air bagi membuat air teh.

examples.semai: Cengroi pulot biasajeh bipegop nukenglem canuk sebelom bimasak.
examples.en: Usually the glutinous rice will be soaked overnight before being cooked.
examples.ms: Biasanya beras pulut akan direndam semalaman sebelum dimasak.

examples.semai: Seluar de bilog ya Bah Lan ajeh peh lei kijag engleg imol seluar ajeh.
examples.en: The trousers worn by Bah Lan were so long that he stepped on one trouser leg.
examples.ms: Seluar yang dipakai oleh Bah Lan adalah labuh sehingga dia memijak sebahagian hujung seluar tersebut.

senses.definition_en: to break; to snap in two

examples.semai: Bah Kamal kipeh memerip batag rangas, kaha-beh bara os ha reknag kak.
examples.en: Bah Kamal broke some pieces of  firewood to make kindling to roast a fish.
examples.ms: Bah Kamal mematahkan berberapa batang kayu api bagi membuat bara api untuk memanggang ikan.

examples.semai: "Cekgu, Bah Man kiurok ilei pek kisekulah arik adeh medei pehod iej," Bah Rani kipasal nu icekgu kelas.
examples.en: "Teacher, Bah Man said he did not come to school today because his stomach hurt," Bah Rani told his class teacher.
examples.ms: "Cikgu, Bah Man berkata dia tidak bersekolah pada hari ini kerana perutnya sakit," Bah Rani memberitahu kepada guru kelasnya.

examples.semai: Baju kurong Wak Pina ha raya tahut adeh iwarne pehog.
examples.en: Wak Pina's aditional dress for this year's Eid celebration is yellow.
examples.ms: Baju kurung Wak Pina bagi sambutan hari raya pada tahun ini bewarna kuning.

senses.definition_en: to crush; to squeeze; to press
senses.definition_ms: menghimpit; memicit; menyebabkan sesuatu ruang pada sesuatu (samada benda atau sebagainya) menjadi lebih sempit dengan cara menghimpit atau memicit

examples.semai: Bah Kamil kijap medei bipeit ya itenek mase naimain gusti-gusti, engrok liknai.
examples.en: Bah Kamil cried because he was being crushed by his brother while they were playing. They said they were only pretending to wrestle.
examples.ms: Bah Kamil menangis kerana dihimpit oleh abangnya semasa mereka bermain. Mereka berkata, mereka hanya berolok-olok sedang gusti.

examples.semai: Wak Bella kipej batu nu kateh kulam, de kibeh dij kak de mong ku kulam ajeh naikekjet.
examples.en: Wah Bella threw a stone into the pond which scared all the fish in it.
examples.ms: Wah Bella melempari batu ke dalam kolam yang membuatkan semua ikan yang terdapat di dalam kolam tersebut menjadi terkejut.

examples.semai: Pejabat Pos bitutop ku arik Sabtu ru minggu.
examples.en: The Post Office is closed on Saturdays and Sundays.
examples.ms: Pejabat Pos ditutup pada hari Sabtu dan Ahad.

examples.semai: Wak Siti kipejam imat sekejap medei imat kijadi leteh ha telampau kineng ha laptop.
examples.en: Wak Siti closed her eyes for a moment because her eyes were tired due to looking at the laptop screen.
examples.ms: Wak Siti memejamkan matanya sekejap kerana matanya letih akibat terlampau melihat kepada skrin laptop.

senses.definition_en: to act like a man in the way she dressed, talk and behaved (to describe a woman)
senses.definition_ms: sengaja berkelakuan seperti lelaki dari segi cara berpakaian, percakapan dan tingkahlaku (untuk menggambarkan seorang perempuan)

examples.semai: "Wak Mila ajeh kipenjantan ha ilei, kipiker bor gamak kilog baju begei ha keral anen?" Wak Tila kipasal nu iamek ha imenang ajeh.
examples.en: "Wak Mila behaves like a man. Does she think dressing like that man is a good thing to do?" Wak Tila told her mother about her sister.
examples.ms: "Wak Mila berkelakuan seperti lelaki, dia fikir dengan berpakaian seperti lelaki itu adalah tindakan yang baik?" Wak Tila memberitahu ibunya tentang adiknya tersebut.

examples.semai: Wak Mary kigemar cak pejet, tapi doh mesti deras nyik iej. Hamapen begei ajeh, kek lekat kigemar cak pejet.
examples.en: Wak Mary likes to eat spicy food, but afterwards she will suffer from stomach ache. Even so, she still enjoys eating spicy food.
examples.ms: Wak Mary suka memakan makanan pedas, tetapi selepas itu mesti mengalami sakit perut. Sungguhpun begitu, dia masih tetap suka memakan makanan pedas.

examples.semai: "Lalu jog hek ajeh, eng ngha-pejos jog-ng," Wak Sara kipasal nu Wak Mar.
examples.en: "Move your feet to the side a bit, I want to straighten my legs," Wak Sara told Wak Mar.
examples.ms: "Ketepikan sikit kaki kamu itu, saya meluruskan kaki saya," Wak Sara berkata kepada Wak Mar.

examples.semai: Bah Sirap tok pek kipoj lei manik kihoj canuk sebelom kijog nu madeg, kek kibercip taleh imutu ku balak manik.
examples.en: Bah Sirap did not wait until the rain stopped first before returning home, but he kept riding his motorcycle in the rain.
examples.ms: Bah Sirap tidak menunggu sehingga hujan berhenti terlebih dahulu sebelum pulang ke rumah, tetapi dia tetap menunggang motosikalnya di dalam hujan untuk pulang.

examples.semai: "Eng ngha-et nu pekan, entah mong ma-ma de haha-kirep?" Bah Dahlan kiurok nu ikenah.
examples.en: Bah Dahlan said to his wife, "I want to go to town. Do you have anything that you want me to buy?"
examples.ms: "Saya mahu pergi ke pekan, kamu ada apa-apa pesanan yang mahu saya belikan?" Bah Dahlan berkata kepada isterinya.

senses.definition_en: to act like a man in the way she dressed, talk and behaved (to describe a woman)
senses.definition_ms: sengaja berkelakuan seperti lelaki dari segi cara berpakaian, percakapan dan tingkahlaku (untuk menggambarkan seorang perempuan)

examples.semai: Wak Rina kipekjot telas kikos ju ibuknet.
examples.en: Wak Rina stretched as soon as she woke up from sleep.
examples.ms: Wak Rina meregangkan badannya sebaik sahaja bangun dari tidur.

examples.semai: "Peklat duet eng de ngdek ku mije sulek hek adeh kelemnek. Tah bok de kekkot, ya hekka?" Bah Ramli kitanya nu ikenah.
examples.en: "The money I put on your makeup table has vanished. I wonder who took it. Did you?" Bah Ramli asked his wife.
examples.ms: "Duit yang saya simpan di atas meja solek kamu ini sudah hilang. Siapakah yang mengambilnya, kamukah?" Bah Ramli bertanya kepada isterinya.

examples.semai: Bah Salam bidenda ya cekgu medei pekseg kiseryap ikerjak sekulah de biog minggu canukjeh.
examples.en: Bah Salam was punished by his teacher because he had not yet finished the homework that had been given the previous week.
examples.ms: Bah Salam didenda oleh gurunya kerana belum menyiapkan kerja sekolah yang diberikan pada minggu lepas lagi.

examples.semai: Taya mutu Bah Kupei peladoh mase ku iceknip kaha-et nu kerjak. Kerana ajehleh kek lingah kitiba nu itempat kerjak.
examples.en: Bah Kupei's motorcycle tyre exploded while he was on his way to work. Because of that he was late arriving there.
examples.ms: Tayar motosikal Bah Kupei meletup semasa dia dalam perjalanan mahu ke tempat kerja. Kerana itulah dia lambat tiba ke tempat kerjanya.

examples.semai: "Biar cip pelahat, asal taleh selamat halei," Wak Nila kibesat nu ikenon litau mase kaha-et nu ikerjak.
examples.en: "It's okay if you are slow, as long as you arrive safely," Wak Nila instructed her son when he wanted to go to work.
examples.ms: "Tidak mengapa jika perlahan, asalkan kamu selamat sampai," Wak Nila berpesan kepada anaknya ketika beliau mahu ke tempat kerja.

senses.definition_ms: pelan; rajah yang menggambarkan bentuk atau gambar sesuatu (bangunan, rumah, kawasan tanah dsbnya)

examples.semai: "Pelan deg jik ya kaha-siap. Telas ajeh, ya bulehle mula bibeh deg jik," Bah Nua kipasal nu ikekawat.
examples.en: "The floor plan of our house is almost ready. Only after that, the construction of our house can begin," Bah Nua told his friends.
examples.ms: "Pelan rumah kami sudah hampir siap. Setelah itu, baharulah pembinaan rumah kami boleh dijalankan," Bah Nua memberitahu rakan-rakannya.

examples.semai: Perut Wah Eca pelcos mendei bilir kibahek.
examples.en: Wa Eca's stomach is bulging because he is too full.
examples.ms: Perut Wa Eca buncit sebab dia terlalu kenyang.

senses.definition_ms: melecur; melepuh atau mengelupas kerana terkena benda panas (cth: air panas, api, dsbnya)

examples.semai: Teg Wak Ima kipeleh medei tekena ya teu beket.
examples.en: Wak Ima's hand was burnt by hot water.
examples.ms: Tangan Wak Ima melecur kerana terkena air panas.

examples.semai: Wak Hani kipelehem cerek kineng ha ragam ikekenon de naipesipah tempat buknet enai de ya kisiap bor-bor pegelap cinek.
examples.en: Wak Hani sighed after seeing the behavior of her children who had made their bedroom messy which she had tidied up in the morning.
examples.ms: Wak Hani mengeluh melihat perangai anak-anaknya yang menyepahkan bilik tidur mereka sendiri yang sudah dia kemas pada waktu pagi dengan sangat baik.

examples.semai: "Seminggu sebelom kidat, jik ya jiperasan ilei iperangei ya pelek. Selalo kitemenung ru kibelwal kihalei," Wak Rina kipasal nu ikekawat ha iapak jop.
examples.en: "A week before he died, we noticed that he was behaving strangely. He was always daydreaming and talking to himself," Wak Rina told her friends about her grandfather.
examples.ms: "Seminggu sebelum dia meninggal dunia, kami sudah perasan bahawa sudah berkelakuan dengan pelik. Dia selalu termenung dan bercakap bersendirian," Wak Rina memberitahu kawan-kawannya mengenai datuknya.

examples.semai: Wak Norah kigemar cak pelek sempak.
examples.en: Wak Norah likes to eat durians.
examples.ms: Wak Norah suka memakan buah durian.

examples.semai: Ku gecek canuk, Bah Rilan bipermuj nu hospitel medei baha-bedah, baha-buang ipelek wog ilei englag de ya rusak ajeh.
examples.en: Last month, Bah Rilan was admitted to hospital for surgery to remove one of his kidneys which had malfunctioned.
examples.ms: Pada bulan yang lepas, Bah Rilan dimasukan ke hospital kerana mahu dibedah bagi membuang sebelah buah pinggangnya yang telah rosak.

examples.semai: Pelep adeh jeoi naihol telas arik manik.
examples.en: Leeches become active after rain.
examples.ms: Pacat selalunya menjadi aktif setelah waktu hujan.

examples.semai: Wak Nani pek kicak kak paten medei pek kilalu ha ingoi de pelih.
examples.en: Wak Nani did not eat the iridescent shark fish because she could not stand the nauseating smell.
examples.ms: Wak Nani tidak memakan ikan patin kerana tidak tahan akan baunya yang hanyir.

examples.semai: "Canak ajeh lekat pelit, medei pai kinam. Poj sekejap dea ya kurang gek kibeket, baruleh hicakcak," amek kiurok nu jik.
examples.en: "The rice is still hot because it has been freshly cooked. Wait for a while until it becomes a little less hot then we eat," my mother told us.
examples.ms: "Nasi tersebut masih panas kerana ianya baharu masak. Tunggu sekejap sehingga menjadi kurang sedikit hangat baharulah kita makan," ibu berkata kepada kami.

examples.semai: "Beket betol ku luar, lei pelit hirasa kena ya pengrag!" Bah Wan kiurok nu ikekawat.
examples.en: "It's very hot outside now until one feels a stinging pain when exposed to the sun!" Bah Wan said to his friends.
examples.ms: "Di luar sekarang sangat panas, sehingga terasa pedih jika terkena pancaran matahari!" Bah Wan berkata kepada kawan-kawannya.

examples.semai: Mai manah entem naiguna pelite sebelom mong lektreg.
examples.en: People in ancient times used lamps before the advent of electricity.
examples.ms: Orang pada zaman dahulu menggunakan pelita sebelum adanya elektrik.

senses.definition_ms: atap; penutup rumah bahagian atas yang diperbuat daripada zink, daun pokok bertam, daun rumbia, daun nipah, dsbnya.

examples.semai: "Pelog deg jik de bibeh ju beltop ya peg. Adeh hunen gensir eng ya kiet kibeli pelog zink dea tahan liu gek," Wak Ramlah kipasal nu iamek.
examples.en: "The roof of our house which is made of bertam leaves has leaked. Now my husband is going to buy a zinc roof so that it will last longer," Wak Ramlah told her mother.
examples.ms: "Atap rumah kami yang diperbuat dari bertam sudah bocor. Sekarang suami saya pergi membeli atap zink supaya tahan lebih lama," Wak Ramlah memberitahu ibunya.

examples.semai: "Hapeloh nij empoj, lekat beloj gulei kak hek adeh," Wak Nita kiurok nu ikenon menaleh.
examples.en: "Put more salt into the fish dish that you have cooked because the taste is still bland," Wak Nita said to her daughter.
examples.ms: "Kamu letakkan lagi garam ke gulai ikan yang kamu masak ini kerana rasanya ianya masih tawar," Wak Nita berkata kepada anak gadisnya.

examples.semai: Pelong deg Bah Rani biperheg ya pinoi mase manik kelem jihnek.
examples.en: The roof of Bah Rani's house was blown away by the wind during the rain last night.
examples.ms: Atap rumah Bah Rani kiterbangkan oleh angin semasa hujan malam tadi.

examples.semai: Wak Wajah ajeh numom pelukes ru kek kigemar belukes gambar pemandangan begei ha gambar deg ku tepi pantei.
examples.en: Wak Wajah is a painter and she loves to draw pictures of scenes such as pictures of houses by the beach.
examples.ms: Wak Wajah adalah seorang pelukis dan dia suka melukis gambar pemandangan seperti gambar rumah di tepi pantai.

examples.semai: Amen hiha-beli peluru, hod mong lisen canuk. Pek buleh hibeli sebarang, doh bicap ya pules.
examples.en: We must have a license if we want to buy ammunition and can not just buy it without because we will be arrested by the police.
examples.ms: Kita haruslah mempunyai lesen jika mahu membeli peluru dan tidak boleh dengan sebarangan membelinya kerana akan ditangkap oleh polis.

examples.semai: "Ha pinjam pembares hek, bulehka?" Wak Ana kitanya nu Wak Jiji.
examples.en: "Can I borrow your ruler?" Wak Ana asked Wak Jiji.
examples.ms: "Bolehkah saya meminjam pembaris kamu?" Wak Ana bertanya kepada Wak Jiji.

senses.definition_en: to warm up body by the fire

examples.semai: Telas ya sudah naibepanah kak, Bah Kudil ru ikekawat naipempom os canuk naiha-berket berog enai sebelom naijog nu madeg.
examples.en: After they had finished fishing with spears in the river, Bah Kudil and his friends warmed up by the fire before returning home.
examples.ms: Setelah mereka memanah ikan di sungai, Bah Kudil dan kawan-kawannya memanaskan badan pada unggun api terlebih dahulu sebelum pulang ke rumah.

senses.definition_en: also; attached to a word that it is intended to emphasize

examples.semai: "Eng pen nghod juga!" Wak Lila kiurok nu igensir bile kineng igensir ajeh kicak aes krem.
examples.en: "I want one, too!" Wak Lila said to her husband when she saw him eating an ice cream.
examples.ms: "Saya pun mahu juga!" Wak Lila berkata kepada suaminya apabila melihat suaminya tersebut memakan ais krim.

examples.semai: Bah Lan bipet ya iapak medei kipenaas ha cok.
examples.en: Bah Lan was beaten by his father for tormenting a dog.
examples.ms: Bah Lan dipukul oleh bapanya kerana dia menyeksa anjing.

senses.definition_en: panadol; a brand of paracetamol; generic name for painkilling medicines

examples.semai: Wak Laili kingut Penadol medei ha tengor ikui.
examples.en: Wak Laili took a Panadol due to dizziness.
examples.ms: Wak Laili meminum Panadol kerana pening kepala.

examples.semai: "Agok pendak caknak, amen hapanei pek lalu haha-perdij, bahagik nu mai kilek," amek kiurok nu menang jik mase jicakcak ku restoren.
examples.en: “Don’t waste food, if you know you can’t finish your food, give the half to someone else,” mother said to our sister when we ate at the restaurant.
examples.ms: "Jangan membazir makanan, jika kamu tahu kamu tidak mampu menghabiskan makanan kamu, berikan separuh kepada orang lain," ibu berkata kepada adik kami semasa kami makan di restoran.

examples.semai: Bah Lan kibeh deg pender ku ibelakang deg, tempat kaha-jekjop.
examples.en: Bah Lan built a hut behind his house as a place to roast fish, chicken or meat.
examples.ms: Bah Lan membuat pondok di belakang rumahnya sebagai tempat untuk membakar ikan, ayam atau daging.

examples.semai: Gerig gemar naipendig ku balak pengrag medei naiha-berket berog enai.
examples.en: Monitor lizards like to sunbathe because they want to warm their bodies.
examples.ms: Biawak suka berjemur di tengah panas kerana ingin memanaskan badan mereka.

examples.semai: Mai kampug sama-sama naikor penep nukali nutahut.
examples.en: The villagers work together to clean the cemetery once a year.
examples.ms: Orang kampung bekerjasama menebas (membersihkan) kawasan perkuburan sekali bagi setiap tahun.

examples.semai: Bah Kala kipengaroh ikekawat sij besi.
examples.en: Bah Kala enticed his friends to steal metal.
examples.ms: Bah Kala mempengaruhi kawan-kawanya untuk mencuri besi.

senses.definition_ms: pembaris; kayu pembaris; kayu pengukur; sejenis alat untuk membuat garisan lurus dsbnya yang diperbuat daripada kayu, logam, besi, dll

examples.semai: "Mongka penggares hek? Ngha-pinjam sekejap," Bah Gani kisemanj nu Wak Kila.
examples.en: "Do you have a ruler?" Bah Gani asked Wak Kila. "I want to borrow it for a while."
examples.ms: "Kamu ada pembariskah? Saya mahu pinjamnya sebentar," Bah Gani meminta kepada Wak Kila.

senses.definition_ms: kefahaman; pengetahuan tentang sesuatu perkara; sesuatu penjelasan yang boleh diterima pakai

examples.semai: Aman hijoi ju pengham mai engrak manah, sej binatag ju darat tok buleh bicak sama ru sej binatag ju kenteu, medei mong ipantag-larang.
examples.en: Based on the understanding of the ancients, meat of animals that live in the forest should not be eaten together with the meat of animals that live in water because it is taboo.
examples.ms: Berdasarkan kefahaman orang tua dahulu kala, daging dari binatang yang tinggal di hutan tidak boleh dimakan bersama-sama dengan daging binatang yang tinggal di dalam air kerana terdapat pantang-larangnya.

examples.semai: Ku jap-jap kampug mesti mong numom penghulu de kijaga ha kampug ajeh.
examples.en: In each village there must be a headman who takes care of the village.
examples.ms: Di setiap kampung mesti terdapat seorang penghulu yang menjaga kampung tersebut.

examples.semai: "Agok nyek, ngut penglai amen hahod deras dea habor," Bah Tali kiurok nu ikenon de kinyek ngut penglai.
examples.en: "Do not refuse, take the medicine if you want to recover quickly," Bah Tali said to his son who was refusing to take it.
examples.ms: "Jangan menolak, minum ubat jika kamu mahu cepat sembuh," Bah Tali berkata kepada anaknya yang enggan meminum ubat.

examples.semai: Wak Lila kigureng pengleg ha ianak buah.
examples.en: Wak Lila fried the eggs for her niece.
examples.ms: Wak Lila menggoreng telur bagi anak buahnya.

examples.semai: "Ipengliu Wak Ujas kimamuh! Eng ya lingah ngha-et kerjak!" itenek kipasal nu amek enai.
examples.en: "Wak Ujas has been in the bathroom a long time! I'm already late for work!" her sister said to their mother.
examples.ms: "Wak Ujas mandi sangat lama! Saya sudah terlambat untuk ke tempat kerja!" kakaknya berkata kepada ibu mereka.

senses.definition_ms: sinaran matahari; keadaan panas (kepanasan) matahari yang menyinar

examples.semai: "Kuat pengrag arik adeh, pek lei 2 jam ya sot abat hik," Wak Nita kipasal nu iamek.
examples.en: "The sun is very strong today, in less than 2 hours our clothes will be dry," Wak Nita told her mother.
examples.ms: "Sinaran matahari sangat kuat hari ini, tidak sampai 2 jam pakaian kita sudah kering," Wak Nita memberitahu ibunya.

examples.semai: "Pengres pog amek eng jooi," Bah Uda kisureh nu ikekawat.
examples.en: "There are a lot of domesticated chickens raised by my mother," Bah Uda told his friends.
examples.ms: "Terdapat banyak ayam ternakan ibu saya," Bah Uda memberitahu rakan-rakannya.

senses.definition_ms: anak angkat; anak orang lain yang diambil menjadi anak sendiri dan dipelihara serta dianggap seakan-akan anak sendiri

examples.semai: Bah Uda ajeh kenon pengres, kek pek kikenal iamek-apak ilei de sebenar.
examples.en: Bah Uda is an adopted child, he does not know his biological parents.
examples.ms: Bah Uda adalah anak angkat, dia tidak mengenali ibu bapanya yang sebenar.

senses.definition_ms: pengumpan; sesuatu yang digunakan untuk menarik perhatian ikan supaya menghampiri mata kail, jaring, perangkap atau umpan yang dipasang

examples.semai: "Penegros ma de haguna ajeh?" Bah Bam kitanya nu Bah Lee mase ubai tengroj.
examples.en: "What feeder bait are you using?" Bah Bam asked Bah Lee while they were fishing.
examples.ms: "Pengumpan apakah yang kamu gunakan?" Bah Bam bertanya kepada Bah Lee semasa mereka berdua memancing.

examples.semai: "Lekat ngoi pengus abat adeh padehal pai ngsah," Wak Manik kiurok nu kateh isengik.
examples.en: "This cloth still smells musty even though I just washed it," Wak Manik said to herself.
examples.ms: "Kain ini masih berbau hapak walaupun saya baharu mencucinya," Wak Manik berkata di dalam hatinya.

examples.semai: "Peninah punya cok! Kicoh ratah ku simin deg hik," engrok Bah Jamil kiberiknus kihalei-halei.
examples.en: "Wretched dog! Its poop is everywhere on the cement," Bah Jamil said angrily to himself.
examples.ms: "Celaka punya anjing! Berak merata-rata di atas simen rumah," kata Bah Jamil yang marah-marah seorang diri.

examples.semai: Bah Kamil kinyok rukok ru ikekawat ku piknoj bas ku simpang kampug telas naiceleh ju bas sekulah. Aleh-aleh iapak kilalu ku pajeh. Ku peninen juga Bah Kamil bitampar ya iapak medei bibakek kinyok rukok.
examples.en: Bah Kamil was smoking cigarettes with his friends at the bus stop, at the village junction after getting off the school bus. Suddenly his father passed by that place. At the very same place his father slapped him because he found him smoking.
